Name: RockAgent S.p.A.
Description:
RockAgent S.p.A. è una delle principali aziende PropTech italiane nel settore della mediazione immobiliare.

Fondata nel 2018 da Daniel Debash, nasce con l’obiettivo di accompagnare gli agenti nell’evoluzione digitale del settore e offrire un ecosistema integrato in cui poter crescere come imprenditori e professionisti.

Il modello RockAgent unisce l’esperienza e la competenza di agenti immobiliari locali alla forza di una struttura centrale altamente specializzata, che fornisce supporto in marketing, area legale, amministrativa e tecnologica. Grazie a una piattaforma proprietaria e a strumenti digitali avanzati, ogni fase del processo immobiliare è tracciata, trasparente e misurabile, garantendo ai clienti un’esperienza efficiente e agli agenti un ambiente di lavoro moderno e performante.

In pochi anni, RockAgent ha gestito oltre 2.500 compravendite e locazioni, con un portafoglio immobiliare di valore superiore a 1 miliardo di euro, costruendo una rete di oltre 150 professionisti attivi in più di 30 città italiane.

Nel 2019 la società ha annunciato un aumento di capitale di oltre 3 milioni di euro per accelerare l’espansione su tutto il territorio nazionale e consolidare la propria struttura operativa.

Oggi RockAgent rappresenta un punto di riferimento per l’innovazione e la modernizzazione del mercato immobiliare italiano, con una visione chiara: valorizzare le persone, potenziare la tecnologia e rendere il processo di compravendita trasparente, efficiente ed accessibile per tutti.

Name: iad España
Description:
Creado en 2008, el Grupo iad debe su éxito a sus cuatro pilares: su experiencia en el sector inmobiliario, el emprendimiento, el marketing de red y la internacionalización. Los más de 20.000 asesores de la red ofrecen así el mejor servicio posible a sus clientes.

Con un crecimiento anual superior al 30 %, iad bate sus propios récords en su mercado de origen, Francia, pero también a nivel internacional, aspirando a convertirse en el número 1 mundial en todos sus mercados.

El Grupo iad nace de la voluntad de crear una red inmobiliaria innovadora, democratizando el sector y dando un mayor apoyo a las personas que desean vender o adquirir una propiedad, a la vez que pone en valor la profesión de asesor inmobiliario. Actualmente, está presente en 8 países y 2 continentes: Francia, Italia, Alemania, UK, Portugal, España, Florida y México.

Por su parte, iad España inicia su andadura en marzo de 2018 y en sus 5 años de actividad no solo ha conseguido implementar el modelo, sino destacar el desarrollo y penetración del mercado, atrayendo a un gran número de emprendedores y facilitándoles su acceso al mercado inmobiliario.

Con sede en Barcelona, iad España, tercera filial del grupo, sigue la tendencia de su predecesor en Francia con un sólido crecimiento y el objetivo de posicionarse en el líder del mercado residencial español.

Nosso destaque se dá ainda por estarmos comprometidos com a qualidade do atendimento oferecido, buscando cada vez mais a excelência não só no atendimento, mas em todos os processos, comercial e administrativo. 

Todo a nossa dedicação e trabalho é realizado através de uma excelente estrutura física, um plano de T&D estruturado para todas as áreas e muita paixão pelo que fazemos.

Name: NYBOLIG DEVELOPMENT DYBVAD, SANDAHL, PETERSEN & CO.
Description:
Rådgivning der optimerer dit næste ejendomsprojekt
Hos Nybolig Development Dybvad, Sandahl og Co. står vi klar til at yde grundig og helhedsorienteret rådgivning, der skaber værdi for projektudviklere og bygherrer med planer for et fremtidigt ejendomsprojekt. Vi har adresse i Aarhus, men forretningen varetager rådgivning og salg af projekter i hele Østjylland, hvor vi i samarbejde vores lokale Nybolig afdelinger sikre et samspil mellem lokalkendskab og projekthåndteringen.

Vi skaber værdi for dig
I spidsen for Nybolig Development. er et bredt hold af kompetente ejendomsmæglere med stor erfaring indenfor rådgivning og salg af projektejendomme. Udover Henrik Sandahl og Brian Kvolbæk der er indehavere af Nybolig Aarhus City, tæller holdet også, Peter Dybvad, Søren Jensen og Ulrik Petersen, der har forretninger i Højbjerg, Viby, Åbyhøj, Tilst og Galten. Vi samarbejder med de lokale ejendomsmæglere i bl.a. Odder, Risskov, mv. så vi altid har en lokal ejendomsmægler med i salgsprocessen.

Vi stiller med et samlet hold på cirka 30 ansatte – herunder ejendomsmæglere og sagsbehandlere – der arbejder for at levere den bedste service og rådgivning på projektmarkedet.

Rådgivning fra skitse til indflytning
Vælger du os som rådgiver på dit byggeri, kan vi hjælpe dig med at sikre den rette strategi og eksekvering af projektet fra skitseprojekt til indflytning. Vores grundige rådgivning tager afsæt i årtiers kendskab til projektmarkedet i Østjylland.

Vi har indenfor de seneste år stået for rådgivning og salg af flere af de største projekter i Aarhus kommune og har derfor et dybdegående kendskab til markedet. Men også salg af mindre rækkehus projekter, grundsalg og nyindretninger af taglejligheder er vores ekspertise.

Mange års erfaring med vurdering, salg og udlejning gør os i stand til at yde værdifuld rådgivning i projektets mange faser. Som din dedikerede samarbejdspartner skaber vi størst værdi ved at blive inddraget tidligt.

Vores drivkraft er jer og vores passion er det pålidelige boligsalg.
Vi sætter kunden i fokus og leverer en yderst høj faglig kvalitet inden for ejendomsmæglerbranchen til en konkurrencedygtig pris, hvorved vort bidrag til kunder overstiger kundernes forventninger.

Her er ingen ekstra omkostninger ved budrunder, hele overbuddet går ubeskåret til jer som sælger. Som sagt I og jeres boligsalg er vores drivkraft og passion. 

Vores mission er at være jeres fortrukne ejendomsmægler i Halsnæs og skabe yderligere vækst. Vi læner os ikke tilbage, vi angriber boligmarkedet proaktivt, er altid nysgerrige, undersøgende og målrettet. Vi brænder for det pålidelige boligsalg.

Este reducido equipo nos permite conseguir procesos más dinámicos, flexibles y fáciles que generan un vínculo más directo con el cliente.

Nos encanta aliarnos con otros profesionales para ampliar y completar servicios específicos (agentes inmobiliarios, arquitectos, diseñadores…etc) y las experiencias que ofrecemos a nuestros clientes.

Name: RealBroker
Description:
Building India’s Trusted Network for Real Estate Brokers

RealBroker is an exclusive platform where real estate brokers connect, collaborate, and close more deals. It helps brokers access more property inventory, streamline agreements, and build a trusted professional network—without relying on chaotic WhatsApp groups or expensive listing portals.

Real estate brokers in India operate in silos, limiting their access to property inventory and making it harder to close deals. Without a structured network, they rely on scattered WhatsApp groups and expensive listing portals, leading to inefficiencies and lost opportunities. This fragmented system forces buyers and sellers to engage multiple brokers, creating a chaotic and untrustworthy market.

RealBroker is an exclusive, invite-only platform that connects real estate brokers, giving them access to a wider property network and trusted partnerships. It streamlines collaboration with digital agreements, inventory management, and productivity tools—eliminating reliance on scattered WhatsApp groups and expensive portals. By fostering a structured and professional ecosystem, RealBroker helps brokers close more deals efficiently and grow their business.

Market opportunity for RealBroker is significant, driven by the scale of India's real estate industry and inefficiencies in broker collaboration:

Massive Industry Size – India’s real estate market was valued at $477B in 2022 and is projected to reach $1T by 2030 (Statista). The brokerage segment alone generates $5B–$10B annually, with brokers spending over 10% of revenue on tools and listing platforms.

Large Broker Base – There are 1.5 million real estate agents in India, with only ~75K RERA-registered professionals. The shift towards premium & luxury housing (₹2Cr+) is attracting a new class of professional brokers who seek structured collaboration.

Inefficiency Creates Demand – Brokers work in silos, losing deals due to limited inventory access.

Name: Atlas Haus
Description:
Having spent several years working as a lawyer both in Trieste and London, I have always found it baffling how quickly people commit an often-significant part of their savings to buying a house in a foreign country. Or how little attention is given to the process of selling a property, ranging from the selection of the appropriate buyer to minimizing transaction costs, tax liabilities and contractual risks. It is hard enough to buy a property in your home country that it seems almost impossible to deal safely and securely with an identical task abroad. 


My goal is to change all of that.


Whether you want to buy, sell or rent a property in Italy I will accompany you throughout the whole process and, where needed, connect you with other trusted professionals (e.g. accountants, public notaries, engineers, architects, interior designers) to ensure that every aspect of the deal will be covered.

Description:
The Intrepid Group  is a full-service  commercial Brokerage and Consulting  firm focused on providing  solutions for RV parks, Campgrounds, Glamping resorts,  Motels, Hotels, Marina properties and Experiential Hospitality assets nationwide.
Our unique business model offers a full spectrum of expertise. We specialize in consulting, brokerage, acquisition, management, and development. Due to our exclusive, national affiliations, we are able to produce the best exposure for your property and have access to a network of buyers and sellers that is unique. 

FOR BUYERS:
A knowledgeable buyer, armed with sound market data and detailed asset class information, is more effective in acquiring assets at the best price. Our sound valuations enable clients to make informed offers that are rational, respected and successful.

FOR SELLERS:
Sound valuations also lead to proper pricing and realistic expectations at the onset. This results in the attraction of more serious inquiries, the elimination of insincere or unqualified buyers, as well as shorter listing periods and faster closed transactions. We specialize in publicly listed, as well as off-market, confidential transactions.

BROKERS:
Because our client properties are scattered through the United States, we engages in good faith, cooperative arrangements with diverse brokers on a nationwide basis, and we gladly co-broke with like-minded brokers interested in sharing this model. We adhere to the interstate laws and regulations governing our profession. We enter into clear contractual arrangements, keep our fiduciary duty to our clients at the foremost of our minds, and seek to maximize mutual goodwill and foster long-term broker relationships.

No matter your needs or focus, give us a call and learn why we are very different in our services!

Name: Progedil Gruppo Immobiliare
Description:
Progedil è un Gruppo specializzato nella consulenza professionale e nella intermediazione immobiliare che offre una completa gamma di servizi Real Estate per società e clienti privati.
Opera nel mercato immobiliare da oltre 30 anni, da quando nel 1990 il Cav. Giuseppe Barile fonda la prima società del Gruppo: la Progedil 90. Originariamente dedicata solo al servizio di commercializzazione di iniziative per imprese di costruzioni, negli anni espande il proprio portafoglio di servizi aprendosi al mercato di intermediazione tra privati. Nel 2004, infatti, Marco Barile, attuale Managing Director del Gruppo, fonda Progedil Case, società che offre servizi di intermediazione per vendite e locazioni immobiliari.   Nel 2020 apre al mercato luxury con Roberti Luxury Real Estate.
A completare la gamma di servizi, il Gruppo stringe accordi strategici di partnership offrendo consulenze creditizie per la concessione di mutui, prodotti assicurativi, ristrutturazioni, forniture complete di arredamenti e servizi per i condomini.

Un Gruppo formato da 150 consulenti immobiliari, oltre al personale corporate, in grado di parlare cinque lingue diverse e specializzato per differenti asset class.
Radicati sul territorio di Roma e Provincia con la presenza di un network residenziale di 9 agenzie immobiliari, oltre alla storica Sede Direzionale che governa, centralizza e coordina tutte le attività e una sede di rappresentanza dedicata alla boutique luxury situata nel centro storico di Roma, nel Foro Traiano.
Il Gruppo conosce a fondo le complessità del mercato immobiliare romano e lo governa con successo garantendo professionalità, trasparenza, competenza e dedizione.
 Valori che, sin dai primi momenti, vengono trasmessi nell’Academy Progedil che forma e aggiorna i propri agenti, garantendo un unico e consolidato metodo di lavoro.

Description:
Welcome to Rose & Dean, UK specialists in residential sales & off-market property and land investment.

Rose & Dean, founded in January 2022 by Tom Rose, Raza Chohan, and Joe Kenton, has redefined the traditional estate agency structure to offer a unique blend of Residential Sales and Off-Market Property & Land Investments. Born out of a shared desire to provide an exceptional service that places clients' goals at the forefront, Rose & Dean takes a distinctive approach to both the residential sales market and investment opportunities.

This approach allows us to focus on maximising and diversifying our clients' wealth, whilst also ensuring the best possible price for the seller.

In the realm of residential sales, we are committed to delivering a comprehensive service that alleviates the stress associated with buying or selling a home. From first-time buyers to experienced home movers, we cover all aspects of the home buying journey, including property search, viewings, negotiation, and final purchase.

Name: AFRICA REAL ESTATE CONFERENCE & EXPO
Description:
The Africa Real Estate Conference and Expo (ARCE) is a prominent event focused on the real estate industry in Africa with focus on bringing together industry professionals, investors, developers, government officials, and other stakeholders interested in the African real estate market. 
The event aims to foster discussions, share knowledge, showcase projects, exhibitions, and provide networking opportunities within the built environment.
Here are some of our features during the conference and expo:

1. Keynote speeches: Renowned speakers from all over the world and in real estate field or related fields deliver keynote addresses, providing insights into the African real estate market, trends, and opportunities as well all Global opportunities
2. Panel discussions and seminars: We cover various topics such as market analysis, investment strategies, regulatory frameworks, sustainable development, urban planning, affordable housing, property management, construction technologies, and other relevant subjects.

3. Project presentations: Developers and investors have the opportunity to showcase their ongoing or upcoming real estate projects in Africa, highlighting their unique aspects and investment potential.

4. Exhibition: An expo floor featuring exhibitors from diverse sectors, including real estate companies, financial institutions, construction firms, architectural firms, property technology providers, and other related industries.

5. Networking opportunities: ARCE provides a platform for networking and building professional relationships with key industry players. Attendees connect with potential investors, partners, clients, government officials, and experts in the field.

6. Workshops and training sessions: All ARCE Conferences feature a pre-conference training programs 

Note that specific details of our conferences and expo, such as the schedule, speakers, and exhibitors, may vary from year to year. Check our website for updates
http://www.arceconference.com

Name: Roche Realty Group, Inc
Description:
Incorporated in 1992, Roche Realty Group is one of the top independent real estate companies in New Hampshire for all-time sales. Since 1997, Roche Realty Group has sold $2,008,374,144 of New Hampshire properties, involving 7,472 transaction sides and has ranked in the Top 10 Real Estate Firms in the entire State of New Hampshire out of 2,354 firms statewide reporting sales during this 21-year period.* 

Roche Realty Group is not an out-of-state brand. We are a family-owned, independent company. With a team of over 30 professional REALTORS and a full-time, in-house support staff, we service the entire Lakes Region, Central New Hampshire, and areas ranging up to the White Mountains. 

Our REALTORS come from diverse backgrounds and offer an in-depth knowledge of our local communities, lakes, and the unique marketplace that is the “Lakes Region.” 

For Roche Realty Group, the Lakes Region is not an afterthought; it is our exclusive focus. We constantly strive to educate the public about the local real estate market and to promote the incredible beauty of our region through our blog articles, social media, our website and our company magazine, “Lakes Region Living.”

As a company, we prioritize integrity and client satisfaction, as well as continuing education for our REALTORS in our ever-changing industry.

Roche Realty Group’s office is located at the entrances of the one of the largest waterfront communities on Lake Winnipesaukee. We invite you to learn about our team and would love the opportunity to assist you with your real estate needs.
* Statistics obtained from NNEREN’s Firm Market Share Report covering the period of 1/1/1997 – 4/26/2018 for all real estate firms in NH

Name: Frimm Academy Milano
Description:
Frimm Academy Milano è l’hub di consulenza e formazione immobiliare del Gruppo FRIMM nel cuore di Milano, in Piazza Eleonora Duse 2. Dal 2018 accompagniamo privati, investitori e sviluppatori in ogni fase di vendita, acquisto e gestione, con un modello che integra brokerage, coaching e tecnologia proprietaria. 

Network che fa la differenza
Siamo parte del terzo network immobiliare d’Italia: MLS REplat collega oltre 1.500 agenzie e più di 2.700 professionisti che condividono in tempo reale incarichi e buyer qualificati, moltiplicando la velocità e la sicurezza delle operazioni. 

Performance provate
Secondo il Report AgentPricing 2024, le agenzie FRIMM gestiscono in media 76,5 incarichi l’anno (+59 % vs. mercato) e concludono il 49 % in più di vendite rispetto alla media nazionale, a conferma dell’impatto del nostro metodo collaborativo. 

Tecnologia proprietaria
Tutte le agenzie del gruppo – oltre 900 – utilizzano oggi Listing+, la piattaforma “all-in-one” con CRM, MLS avanzato e Intelligenza Artificiale che incrementa le performance fino al 35 %. 

Formazione continua
Grazie alla nostra Academy eroghiamo più di 200 webinar on-demand e percorsi certificati dedicati a consulenti, broker e neofiti che vogliono costruire una carriera solida nel real estate.

Cosa facciamo per te

Vendita e acquisto residenziale e commerciale

Property finding e advisory investimento

Gestione short-rent con brand Livly

Valutazioni data-driven e marketing premium

Il tuo progetto immobiliare merita il metodo FRIMM: contattaci per trasformare un’esigenza in un risultato concreto, prima di tutti, meglio di tutti.

Name: DNA Crypto
Description:

As a regulated Virtual Asset Service Provider (VASP) in Poland, we operate in full compliance with EU and MiCA-aligned standards, delivering a trusted alternative to exchanges for large crypto purchases. Our clients benefit from deep liquidity, competitive institutional pricing, and discreet settlement backed by secure banking and custody partners.
What We Offer
•	High-value Bitcoin, ISO 20200 Assets and USDC & EURC trading (€50k–€10M+)
•	Locked-in quotes to protect against volatility
•	Zero-slippage execution for large trades
•	Deep global liquidity from institutional partners
•	Fast settlement via SEPA and international wire
•	Delivery directly to client-controlled wallets
•	Regulated KYC/KYB onboarding
•	Secure custody and treasury workflows
•	Dedicated account managers for personalised service
Who We Serve
 Institutional investors
 Family offices
 Corporate treasuries
 High-net-worth individuals
 Professional traders

Our Mission
To deliver secure, transparent, and premium OTC crypto services built for Europe’s most sophisticated investors — combining regulatory assurance, personalised service, and institutional execution quality.
If you’re looking to execute large crypto trades with confidence, privacy, and compliance, our team is ready to assist.

Description:

Founded by Doris Ishack in 2008, DI Properties has grown to become one of London’s fastest-growing independent property consultancies. DI Properties’ reputation has been built on its unrelenting passion for the industry, unquestionable integrity and commitment to clients. 

Combined, the team has more than 50 years of industry experience and expertise across a variety of Development and Investment opportunities. This includes residential development with and without planning permission (from £1m to over £100m), HMO blocks and residential blocks of flats. In addition, mixed-use buildings with potential for development or improvement through asset management, hotels, offices, permitted development, ground rent portfolios and affordable housing stock. Furthermore, due to client and market demand, DI Properties are expanding their PRS portfolio.

DI Properties’ network and clients span small and large developers, landowners, individual investors, institutions and funds. DI Properties are mandated by UK and overseas clients to purchase small to large scale sites and are able to act on their behalf immediately. Name: Sunset Realtors LTD
Description:
At Sunset Realtors we are not only concerned with our customers buying from us, we are also focused on helping to facilitate those with interest but can’t afford the offers on the table. With this in view, we resolved to start a Co-operative Investment Scheme from land banking to being landlords, by just purchasing a certain percentage of the property of interest and gaining a passive income in the process. 
The Co-operate Investment scheme is a well-structured system driven with 3 vehicles: 
1.	Mutual funds
2.	Group investment 
3.	Trust investors 
The Mutual Funds also known as Land Banking, allows a customer to buy just a fraction percent of a land within an estate, to gain profit over time. It involves 2 to 4 customers that can purchase a piece of land with each having 25% shared ownership, with the option of selling it off after a certain period per agreement. 
The Group Investment gives opportunities for those that build to flip. They can leverage on this vehicle and diversify their seed capital investment with just paying 25% to 50% cost of construction to generate income after property is sold off. A single project can be owned by multiple investors with the same or similar interest.
The Trust Investors are known to be landlords. They are clients with interest to own a property for the purpose of getting returns through rentals. With this vehicle, a client can pay just 25% to 50% cost value of a property and begin to generate returns through rentals, which is proportional to what the client invested on the property.

Hierdoor weten wij op welk moment door te pakken, de emotie weg te nemen en het ijzer te smeden als het heet is. In elke huizenmarkt, dus ook in een overspannen huizenmarkt houden wij het hoofd koel.

Het doel van samenwerken is om uiteindelijk jouw droomhuis te vinden en voor een zo gunstige mogelijke en marktconforme prijs en voorwaarden aan te kopen! 

ikzoekuwhuis.nl is een onafhankelijke schakel tussen koper en verkoper en werkt exclusief voor de koper. 

Een samenwerking bespaart de koper dan ook tijd, geld en stress. Wij zijn 100% aankoopmakelaar. Er kan dus geen conflictsituatie of belangenverstrengeling ontstaan in het aankoopproces omdat wij geen woningen verkopen. 

Aankopen in Spanje: Costa del Sol en Costa Blanca
We werken in Spanje hetzelfde als in Nederland en hebben een Nederlandstalig netwerk van o.a. advocaten en notarissen. Wij begeleiden ook hier de aankoop van je (tweede) woning van A-Z.

Name: Eiendomsmeglerne
Description:
Hos Eiendomsmeglerne bygger vi megler – ikke kjede.
Vi tror på tre grunnpilarer som gjør våre meglere best rustet til å lykkes:

Bygging av meglerens merkevare – synlighet gir tillit, og tillit gir flere oppdrag. Hos oss er det den enkelte megler som står i sentrum, ikke en kjedelogo.

Frihet og fleksibilitet – våre meglere styrer sin egen hverdag og har tilgang til digitale ressurser 24/7, moderne lokaler og støtte tilpasset egne behov.

Bransjens beste kompensasjon – vi mener at de som gjør jobben også skal sitte igjen med verdien. Våre meglere har rammer som gir økonomisk trygghet og rom for å levere ekstra godt til kundene sine.

Med denne modellen kan våre meglere være mer til stede, levere mer personlig oppfølging og bygge en sterk posisjon i sitt lokalmiljø. Resultatet er bedre kundeopplevelser – og bedre resultater for både megler og boligselger.

Vil du vite mer?
Ta kontakt om du er megler som ønsker større frihet og muligheter – eller boligselger som vil samarbeide med noen av bransjens mest dedikerte meglere.

Name: Ejendomsmæglerfirmaet Vogel & Vandel
Description:
Vogel & Vandel er stiftet af Alexander Vogel og Luca Vandel.

I 2019 krydser deres veje for første gang og har siden været uadskillelige. De fandt hurtigt ud af, at de sammen kan skabe noget helt unikt for deres kunder. 

De er hvidt forskellige og har hver deres styrker som komplimenterer hinanden godt. Dette har resulteret i mange rekordsalg
til glæde for deres sælgere. 
 
Sammen udgør de og resten af holdet et passioneret team, med mange års erfaring inden for boligsalg. 

Vi ved at ingen mennesker er ens og alle boliger er forskellige. Derfor finder du ikke en samlebåndsløsning hos os.

Et salg er ikke bare et salg og vejen til mål er vigtig. Vi ligger en strategi for hver sag og ligger en nøje plan for, hvordan det enkelte salg skal gribes an, 
for at skabe de bedste forudsætninger for det bedste salg. 

Vi benytter os af de gamle dyder som gennem tiden har virket og krydrer det med nutidens trends og tendenser. 

Vi vil hellere være et sted for meget end for lidt i jagten på den rigtige køber.

Vi er uafhængige og har friheden til sammen med dig at skræddersy det salg, som vi i fællesskab mener skal bane vejen til succes.

De seneste år har vi specialiseret os med de sociale medier. De er kommet for at blive og er blevet en af de vigtigste

La potente rete di KW e le tecnologie esclusive condivise con tutti gli associati ci consentono infatti, ogni giorno, di attirare migliaia di potenziali acquirenti, sia da tutta Milano che a livello internazionale.
I professionisti di KWProperties vantano una consolidata esperienza del mercato milanese nei settori residenziale e commerciale (hotel, uffici, show-room, negozi, industriale) e rappresentano una fonte ineguagliabile di competenza, integrità e trasparenza, permettendo di garantire la vendita dell’immobile velocemente e al miglior valore possibile, grazie all’esperienza.

Come ci riusciamo?
• Elaboriamo necessità e aspettative, fornendo risposta a qualsiasi dubbio o domanda.
• Individuiamo il corretto valore di mercato di ogni immobile, comparando nella valutazione lo storico all’attuale stock in vendita. 
• Consigliamo quali azioni mettere in atto per valorizzare al meglio il bene.
• Strutturiamo un piano di marketing completo attraverso i principali e migliori canali di comunicazione.
• Coordiniamo il processo di presentazione in accordo con impegni, ritmi e dinamiche dei proprietari.
• Collaboriamo alla presentazione di tutte le offerte, consigliando su termini e possibili imprevisti.
• Seguiamo la preparazione di tutti i documenti necessari fino al rogito notarile.

No somos una agencia inmobiliaria tradicional.
Nuestro trabajo no empieza con propiedades, sino con preguntas: contexto, riesgos, objetivos y sentido de la decisión.

Acompañamos a compradores internacionales y propietarios que quieren actuar con criterio al comprar, vender o preparar un inmueble, priorizando la claridad y el método frente a la prisa o la presión del mercado.

Además, Heaven House actúa como primer filtro estratégico para emprendedores e inversores extranjeros que evalúan España como destino empresarial. Antes de constituir, invertir o mover recursos, ayudamos a ordenar el mapa de decisiones y, cuando procede, coordinamos el trabajo con partners especializados en estructura, fiscalidad y financiación.

Nuestro valor no está en prometer resultados, sino en mejorar la calidad de las decisiones.
A veces, avanzar es la opción correcta.
Otras veces, esperar o no actuar también lo es.

Heaven House trabaja con un enfoque de protección de la decisión, pensado para quienes prefieren comprender antes de comprometer tiempo, capital o energía.

Name: International Investment Marbella
Description:
We are a family-run business that has been selling luxury properties on the Costa del Sol for almost 23 years, in both primary and secondary market.
 
We came to Marbella in 2001, just for a holiday. By chance, we stayed for good. The first day we bought a house here. At the time, however, there was no one to help us Poles through the whole process.
 
This is how the idea of opening the first Polish real estate agency on the Costa del Sol was born. Today, in our second generation, we continue to inspire people with our love for the most beautiful places in Spain and make their dreams of owning a home on the Andalusian coast come true.
 
We broker the sale of flats and houses and we have our own building projects. We are currently working on two projects right on the Costa del Sol.
 
We take a tailored approach to each client, striving to understand their needs and match the property perfectly to their expectations and lifestyle. We separate the property search process for investment clients and those looking for a property for their own needs.
 
We provide a comprehensive and attentive service for any budget. We offer a wide range of services, from assistance with formalities to simple help in moving into your new home.
 
Our work does not end at sales. Our key focus is on customer relationship and satisfaction. We offer a full range of after-sales services, including property commissioning, assistance in the interior design process, selection of furnishings, renovations (in the case of buying a secondary market property), property rental management services or comprehensive property management and property maintenance for the client.
 
Hundreds of satisfied clients and the prestigious title of Best Real Estate Agency Costa del Sol in Andalusia are proof of our values and commitment.
 
It will be nice to meet you!

Name: The Raleigh Green Real Estate Group
Description:
Raleigh Green is one of the foremost luxury real estate advisors in the Dallas-Fort Worth area, with five-star reviews from all his clients. Innovation and hard work are not just buzzwords to him: They are true characteristics of Raleigh’s work ethic and commitment to authentic relationships that inspire fierce client loyalty. He is a proven leader, a top producer and a force to be reckoned with when negotiating on behalf of his clients.

Born and raised in Fort Worth, Raleigh is active in the community and serves on the board of the Monticello Neighborhood Association, the tennis committee of the River Crest Country Club and is a Re-Engage leader at Christ Chapel Bible Church, where he and his family are members. Fun fact: Raleigh’s community knowledge and associations have earned him the nickname “The Mayor of Fort Worth.” As a former NCAA Division 1 athlete at The University of Texas at Austin, a graduate of Texas Christian University in Fort Worth and an MBA graduate from Southern Methodist University in Dallas, Raleigh has the Texas connections and insight to be the real estate agent to trust with every real estate need.

Name: ELISE Elite Service Enterprise d.o.o.
Description:
Über uns – ELISE Real Estate

Live your dream – sicher ankommen auf Korčula

Wir glauben: Ein Immobilienkauf im Ausland ist mehr als ein Geschäft – er ist der Beginn eines neuen Lebensabschnitts. Unser Ziel ist es, Ihnen diesen Schritt einfach, transparent und sicher zu machen.

Ich bin Andreas Jirka, Gründer und CEO von ELISE Real Estate. Nach über 35 Jahren Unternehmertum in Österreich habe ich meinen Traum vom Leben am Meer verwirklicht – hier auf der Insel Korčula in Kroatien. Aus eigener Erfahrung weiß ich, wie viele Fragen und Unsicherheiten auf diesem Weg auftreten. Genau deshalb habe ich ELISE gegründet: um Ihnen den kompletten Service und das nötige Insiderwissen zu bieten.

Was uns auszeichnet:
	•	Persönliche Betreuung – Sie sprechen direkt mit mir oder meinem kleinen Team.
	•	Volle Transparenz – jeder Schritt und jede Kostenposition wird klar erklärt.
	•	Komplettservice – von der Objektsuche bis zur Schlüsselübergabe.
	•	Lokale Expertise – wir leben hier und kennen Lagen, Behörden und Menschen.

Unsere Kunden sind vor allem:
	•	Menschen 50+, die ihren Ruhestand am Meer genießen wollen.
	•	Käufer mit Abfindung, die sicher investieren möchten.
	•	Familien, die ein Ferienhaus mit Zukunftsperspektive suchen.

Unser Versprechen: Wir verbinden Mensch-zu-Mensch-Vertrauen mit modernen Tools und klaren Prozessen. So entsteht eine Zusammenarbeit, die professionell und angenehm ist – mit einem Ziel: Ihren Traum vom Leben am Meer zu verwirklichen.

andreas.jirka@elise.services
 +43/664/3341628
 www.elise.services

Name: ORPI Dana immobilier
Description:
Vous trouverez dans notre agence, un service de transaction en habitat (vente et location de maisons, appartements, propriétés, programmes neufs), un service dédié à la transaction commerciale, (vente et location de locaux à usage professionnel et fonds de commerce)

Notre agence immobilière vous accueille à Golfe Juan, du lundi au samedi, dans une ambiance chaleureuse et familiale. Nos conseillers mettent à votre disposition leur parfaite maîtrise du marché immobilier local et des environs, pour vous aider à réaliser l’achat de votre future villa, appartement, sur Antibes, Le Cap d’Antibes, Juan les Pins.

La force de choix du réseau ORPI et celle de notre réseau en inter-cabinet vous permettront de découvrir un vaste choix de biens, dont certains en exclusivité, et de préparer efficacement avec un seul interlocuteur, votre achat immobilier sur Golfe Juan, Antibes, Juan les Pins et ses environs.

Avec ORPI, vous bénéficiez de tous les services et avantages mis en place par le réseau :

Une estimation fiable, la souplesse d’un mandat exclusif, la garantie d’implication dans la vente de votre bien, un fichier commun performant, une transaction sécurisée, une garantie de revente, et le service après vente.

Le Fichier Commun ORPI offre à votre annonce immobilière une diffusion nationale, une diffusion au sein des 22 agences immobilières ORPI sur Golfe Juan - Antibes - Juan les Pins et  cannes

L’E.C.M. (Etude Comparative de Marché) : une estimation fiable et professionnelle pour la vente de votre bien immobilier sur Antibes - Juan les Pins et ses environs, vous permet d’obtenir un prix justifié et un document analytique.

Le Mandat Réussite : un contrat de vente en exclusivité vous permettant de vendre votre bien par vous-même et de bénéficier ainsi d’une rétrocession de 50% des honoraires d’agence.

Name: Redres de Bouwkunstmakelaar | erfgoed - bouwkunst - vintage - architectuur
Description:
Altijd al gedroomd om te wonen en werken in een karaktervol huis gebouwd met creativiteit en vakmanschap? Wakker worden in een fabriekspand, boerderij, herenhuis, schoolgebouw, kerk, molen, of watertoren, wie wil dat nu niet. Kortom een gebouw op een unieke locatie met uitstraling, schoonheid en historie. 

Nederland is rijk aan bijzonder erfgoed en dagelijks zijn we met veel passie en plezier bezig met het waarderen van erfgoed. We weten als geen ander de kwaliteiten en potentie van bijzondere gebouwen en complexen te herkennen en uit te dragen. Voor ons is het de gewoonste zaak van de wereld de unieke eigenschappen, historie en daarmee samenhangende gevoelswaarde, te vertalen in een marktproduct met toekomstwaarde. Wij werken daarbij transparant, integer, onafhankelijk en professioneel.

Redres de Bouwkunstmakelaar beschikt in haar portefeuille over veel bijzondere gebouwen die stuk voor stuk vaak prachtige, historische, beeldbepalende gebouwen zijn. Wanneer u op zoek bent naar historisch erfgoed en een bijzonder object wil kopen of verkopen, dan kunt u niet om Redres heen. 

Ons unieke concept speelt duidelijk in op een specifieke doelgroep in de markt. Architectuur- en erfgoedliefhebbers, mensen die ánders willen wonen of werken dan "doorsnee", en mensen die op zoek zijn naar een droom, een creatief idee over erfgoed hebben, kunnen naar hartenlust rondstruinen in ons aanbod. 

Wij zijn gespecialiseerd in bijzondere objecten om te wonen of te werken zoals bijvoorbeeld kerken, kloosters, schoolgebouwen, industrieel erfgoed, watertorens, molens, vintage vastgoed, bijzondere architectuur en andere parels uit het recente verleden en lang vervlogen tijden.

Redres de Bouwkunstmakelaar is opgericht in 2003 door ir. Jan-Willem Andriessen (1971) en sindsdien uitgegroeid tot de grootste erfgoedexpert met het leukste én mooiste erfgoedaanbod van Nederland.

re dres~seren (ov.ww.) betekent: weer in orde brengen, herstellen.

Name: Ariane Project - Outils immobiliers
Description:
Ariane Project est une société qui équipe les agents immobiliers de meilleurs outils afin qu’ils puissent offrir un service plus complet et innovant aux particuliers tout en se démarquant de la concurrence. 

Grâce à Ariane Project, les agents immobiliers ont la possibilité de générer davantage l’intérêt des particuliers en mettant en valeur chaque bien immobilier par les dernières technologies de l’image (visite virtuelle, prises de vues au drone, home staging, photos/vidéos pro). Nous leur offrons également l’opportunité d’être totalement transparent sur l’état du bien en fournissant un état des lieux ultra détaillé, des plans précis et une estimation des coûts de rénovation afin de rassurer les potentiels acheteurs. 
Grâce aux services d’Ariane, les particuliers ont aussi la possibilité de calculer leur besoin en crédit et d’emprunts ou de bénéficier d’un suivi des visites par le biais d’une application vendeur, afin de faciliter le processus d’achat et de vente. Cette quantité d’informations est alors représentée de manière moderne et interactive au travers d’un site internet entièrement dédié au bien ainsi qu’un livret récapitulatif à distribué lors des visites afin de faciliter la prise de décision. 

La volonté d’Ariane est de mettre au centre de la relation immobilière entre un agent immobilier et un particulier, une transparence et confiance aveugle, ainsi qu’un service justifiant davantage le prix de la commission demandée.

Name: B&S Land
Description:
B&S Land was formed in 1999 to solely specialise in advising and assisting our clients in the sale of development land.
With 80 years combined experience, the team at B&S Land of Frank Nagle, Andrew Egan and Callum Williamson have a second-to-none understanding of development land, from its planning nuances,
its engineering constraints and ultimately, its value regime and buyer pool.
“We are able to accurately assess potential lot yield, development costings, planning timelines and future revenues to provide landowners with the sage advice they require when deciding to sell their land”.
Our extensive national and international buyer database, recent sales knowledge, research sponsorship and active involvement with industry groups such as UDIA (Urban Development Institute) ensures that we are always up to date with government planning policies, industry practices and more importantly, contemporary land sale values and the active buyers in the market.
Having now achieved over $10 billion in development land sales, we have grown from our Melbourne office into other states, with land transactions now in Western Australia, New South Wales and Queensland.
Following several high-profile transactions across South-east Queensland, B&S Land have opened a Queensland office to cater for the increased demand in development sites for the region.

Description:
The Storage Scoop delivers monthly news reports covering all aspects of self-storage, recreational storage, and vehicle/truck storage. Our primary goal is to keep the self-storage industry informed with updates relevant to both the sector and RIPCO Self-Storage.

RIPCO Self-Storage specializes in representing both buyers and sellers of storage-related properties, including Self-Storage, Recreational Storage, and Vehicle Storage. While headquartered in Tampa, Florida, our primary focus is on the state, although our proven track record includes successful transactions in 16 additional states. Name: Milma
Description:
Bienvenue chez Milma - Le Réseau d'Excellence Immobilière 

Milma est bien plus qu'un réseau de mandataires immobiliers, c'est une révolution dans le domaine de l'immobilier.

Notre ADN Unique 

Milma se distingue par son ADN, mettant en avant les agences immobilières. Au cœur de notre mission, nous croyons que les agences détiennent le précieux savoir-faire de l'immobilier. C'est pourquoi nous avons réuni cette expertise avec une nouvelle vague d'indépendants qui aspirent à exercer ce métier depuis chez eux, sans les contraintes d'une agence physique.

Les Avantages pour les Agences Immobilières 

En choisissant Milma, les agences ont l'opportunité de développer une autre équipe de conseillers, d'indépendants, qui représentent aujourd'hui 48% de la force commerciale de ce secteur. Cela leur permet de jouer sur deux tableaux simultanément. De plus, en se développant sous la marque Milma, elles concentrent leur force sous une marque nationale forte qui rivalisera avec les autres réseaux.

Un autre avantage est la protection de la e-réputation des agences. Si un client a une mauvaise expérience avec un mandataire Milma, cela ne nuira pas à l'agence, car le mandataire est sous contrat Milma.

Les Avantages pour les Indépendants 

Pour les indépendants, Milma offre une marque prestigieuse soutenue par le savoir-faire des agences immobilières. Ils gagneront un temps précieux dans leur reconversion professionnelle grâce à une immersion sur le terrain, où ils acquerront les compétences essentielles en un minimum de temps, avec la confiance de l'agence. Le parrainage et le soutien à distance les guideront jusqu'à leur autonomie financière.

Un Modèle de Rémunération Inédit 

Milma propose un modèle de rémunération MLM sur 5 générations. Les directeurs d'agence et les indépendants verront leurs revenus augmenter à mesure que leurs filleuls coopte de nouveaux membres, sur 5 niveaux, leur permettant de percevoir des revenus sur chaque vente à vie.

Iti oferim servicii complexe:

⁃ intermediere inchiriere apartamente, case, terenuri, spatii;

Care sunt beneficiile tale apeland la noi?
Intelegem exact nevoia si solicitarile tale.
Iti vom personaliza solicitarile, astfel incat sa primesti doar solutiile conforme asteptarilor si nevoilor tale.
Promptitudine si celeritate in identificarea celei mai bune solutii imobiliare.

Consultanta imobiliara din partea specialistilor cu vasta experienta in domeniul imobiliar.
Consultanta juridica de specialitate din partea consilierilor juridici si avocatilor nostri colaboratori.
Eficienta in vederea reducerii considerabile a timpului de cautare, inchiriere sau vanzare imobiliara.
Siguranta tranzactiei imobiliare.

Description:
Immoduna bietet Ärzten einen umfassenden Service für Immobilieninvestitionen, von der Beratung bis zur Schlüsselübergabe. Unser Ziel ist es, Altersvorsorge, steuerliche Vorteile und Vermögensaufbau unserer Kunden zu maximieren.

Individuelle Beratung und Planung: Wir beginnen mit einer gründlichen Bedarfsanalyse, um die finanziellen Ziele unserer Kunden zu verstehen. Auf Basis der individuellen Ziele und der Risikobereitschaft entwickeln wir eine maßgeschneiderte Investmentstrategie und bieten Einblicke in renditestarke Immobilienmärkte.

Auswahl der passenden Immobilien: Wir präsentieren sorgfältig ausgewählte Immobilien, die optimal zu den Anforderungen unserer Kunden passen. Unsere Kunden profitieren von exklusivem Zugang zu Immobilienprojekten, die speziell auf Ärzte zugeschnitten sind. Jede Immobilie wird vorab gründlich geprüft und transparent mit Renditeprognosen und steuerlichen Vorteilen präsentiert.

Finanzierung und Steueroptimierung: Immoduna unterstützt bei der Finanzierung der Immobilieninvestition und sorgt für eine optimale steuerliche Gestaltung. Durch unsere Partnerbanken bieten wir günstige Finanzierungskonditionen und entwickeln individuelle steuerliche Strategien zur optimalen Nutzung von Abschreibungsmöglichkeiten.

Abwicklung und Schlüsselübergabe: Wir kümmern uns um die gesamte Abwicklung des Kaufs, von der Verhandlung bis zur Schlüsselübergabe. Mit erfahrenen Rechtsanwälten minimieren wir rechtliche Risiken und übernehmen alle administrativen Aufgaben, einschließlich Preisverhandlungen und Dokumentenmanagement.

Immobilienverwaltung und Nachbetreuung: Nach dem Kauf sorgt Immoduna dafür, dass die Immobilie professionell verwaltet wird und unterstützt bei der steuerlichen Abwicklung. Unsere Dienstleistungen umfassen Mieterbetreuung, Instandhaltung, Mietinkasso und die kontinuierliche Überwachung des Immobilienportfolios.

Immoduna bietet Ärzten eine sichere, transparente und stressfreie Möglichkeit, in Immobilien zu investieren.

Name: FoxAgencyRE
Description:
Agility in Real Estate Investments means...
The Need for Agility in Real Estate Investments.
It goes without saying that when you’re looking to invest your money, it’s important to balance the potential returns against the risks.While many have made good money in things like the .com boom and cryptocurrencies, for example, these trendy investments can often become a bubble that’s just waiting to burst.On the other hand, for the cautious investor, property remains one of the best places to invest your money.Still, that’s not to say that any investment in real estate is a guaranteed win. While property remains desirable, the changing nature of the markets requires an agile approach from investors.

What is Agility in Business?To begin, we must clarify what an agile approach in business means.At a basic level, readers from the business world will already be familiar with the term. But, our aim here is to be concise and go deeper, especially with the property market.In brief, agility means being able to adapt to change quickly; perceiving risks and threats; and adapting your strategy to accommodate them, thereby gaining an advantage over your competitors.But what does that have to do with real estate investment? Glad you asked!At Fox Agency, we strive for agility in the real estate investment.

Name: En Casa Premium Real Estate / Biuro Nieruchomości
Description:
Biuro nieruchomości,

które powstało z fascynacji do dóbr luksusowych, z pasji do fotografii, designu i chęci tworzenia wyjątkowych rozwiązań. Skrojone na miarę, perfekcyjnie dopasowane do warszawskiego stylu życia. Biuro stworzone przez niespokojne dusze i wielkich marzycieli.

…rzeczywistość, którą tworzymy dla Państwa.

En Casa jest naszym autorskim dziełem, dzięki któremu możemy dostarczać niepowtarzalną usługę, a Państwa potrzeby spełniać w każdym calu. Motorem stworzenia biura była i jest nasza ogromna potrzeba kreowania i wprowadzania zmian do otoczenia. Zdajemy sobie sprawę jak trudno jest dziś zadowolić Klienta, jak szybko zmienia się rynek, a przy tym potrzeby… a my stawiając na pierwszym miejscu Państwa chcemy, aby nasze nieszablonowe podejście do obrotu nieruchomościami i szacunek do czasu zaspokoiły te wymagania. Zatem wszystko co powstało i co dalej tworzymy jest dla Państwa, aby pokazać, że zakup, czy wynajem nieruchomości może być wyjątkową i przyjemną chwilą.

Od początku działalności skupiamy się na warszawskim segmencie wyższym oraz Premium. Zdobyte doświadczenie w połączeniu ze znajomością rynku, pozwoliły nam wypracować profesjonalne i skrojone na miarę indywidualnych potrzeb rozwiązania. Nasze usługi kierujemy do ludzi nastawionych na kontakt z profesjonalistami. Oferujemy kompleksową i fachową pomoc oraz wsparcie podczas całego procesu związanego z obrotem nieruchomościami, ale z przyjemnością przyjmujemy także zlecenia mniej standardowe.

Wysłuchamy i spełnimy oczekiwania.

Pozdrawiamy
Zespół En Casa

Name: Pell-Rich Immobilien
Description:
Ihr Immobilienmakler in Karlsruhe

Das Maklerunternehmen mit Sitz in Karlsruhe wurde Anfang 2014 gegründet.
Seit Gründung konnte das Unternehmen bis dato mehr als 100 Millionen Euro Objektvolumen alleine im Wohnbereich erfolgreich vermitteln.
Auch im Gewerbebereich hat das Unternehmen eine Vielzahl von Büros,-und Praxisräumlichkeiten, mehrere Lagerhallen mit Büroeinheiten wie auch mehrere Einzelhandelsgeschäfte in 1A-Lagen von Karlsruhe erfolgreich vermieten und mehrere Gewerbeobjekte verkaufen können.
Als professionelles Maklerunternehmen bietet Pell-Rich Immobilien ein umfassendes Leistungskonzept, das auf den Kunden individuell abgestimmt wird. Die Vermarktung eines Verkaufsobjekts umfasst die Erstellung eines hochwertigen Exposés, inklusive Außenaufnahmen via Drohne, die sachverständige Wertermittlung und zahlreiche weitere Maßnahmen für einen schnellen Verkaufserfolg.
Ausgezeichnet zum BEST PROPERTY AGENT zum sechsten Mal in Folge (2016-2024) von der Fachzeitschrift Bellevue, zählt Pell-Rich Immobilien zu den besten Maklerbüros in Europa – nur qualifizierte und international ausgezeichnet Maklerbüros dürfen diesen Titel tragen. Auch FOCUS zeichnet Pell-Rich Immobilien 2024 zum siebten Mal in Folge im Immobilienatlas zu den TOP 1000 Maklerunternehmen in Deutschland aus. Erstmals wurde Pell-Rich Immobilien 2019 auch vom Wirtschaftsmagazin CAPITAL zu den besten Maklerunternehmen in Deutschland gezählt.
Als geprüfte und zertifizierte Sachverständige der Sprengnetter Akademie – Deutschlands größte Akademie für Immobilienbewertung -, erstellt Ihnen Pell-Rich Immobilien sachverständige und zertifizierte Verkehrswertberechnungen über Ihr Objekt.
Darüber hinaus halten Herr Pellinghoff und Herr Gierich im Auftrag der Sprengnetter Akademie sowie weiteren Akademien wie bspw. die Maklersprechstunde deutschlandweite Schulungen als Referenten für die Gebäudewertermittlung und zum Thema Marketing in der Immobilienwirtschaft.

Name: Boomgaardt bedrijfsmakelaars & register taxateurs
Description:
Het beleggen in vastgoed brengt altijd een bepaald risico met zich mee, het is daarom belangrijk dat het op een verstandige manier gebeurt. Boomgaardt bedrijfsmakelaars past de kennis toe die nodig is om goed te beoordelen hoe het rendement nu is, wat u kunt verwachten in de toekomst en wat de risico’s zijn. We bespreken graag met u de eventuele opbrengsten van een belegging en laten u graag het beleggingsvastgoed in onze portefeuille zien.

De verhuurmarkt van bedrijfspanden en residentieel vastgoed (wonen) wordt steeds complexer, daarom geven wij u graag het benodigde advies. Door ons brede netwerk, zijn er tal van beleggingsmogelijkheden die interessant kunnen zijn voor u.

Beleggen in Box 3 kan erg interessant zijn. Wanneer we een interessant beleggingsobject in het vizier hebben, handelen we snel. Eerst maken we kennis met de verkoper, daarna maken we een prijsindicatie en vervolgens komen we spoedig met een prijsadvies.

Name: TA_MA_RA_S
Description:
Somos uma imobiliária que busca oferecer uma experiencia pautada na objetividade e transparência nas informações para reduzir o esforço e tempo gasto na procura por imóveis

Nossa principal vitrine é o Instagram @ta_ma_ra_s onde postamos videos objetivos e informativos de imóveis

Inconformada com as práticas tradicionais do mercado imobiliário, a Mara Imóveis foi fundada por Tamara “Maramores” Stief, uma ex-insider com 15 anos de atuação em incorporadoras para oferecer uma experiência superior na busca por imóveis. 

Um dos pontos de inflexão dessa jornada foi a péssima experiência de um cliente na compra de um imóvel de R$ 6 milhões, quando o gerente da incorporadora insistiu em pressionar o cliente a assinar o contrato em 3 dias ameaçando reajuste do preço pactuado. 

“Como pode a experiência de compra de um imóvel de alto padrão ser inferior ao da compra de uma bolsa de grife?” Pensou. 

Assim se consolidou a ideia de que estava tudo errado e era necessário fazer algo completamente novo. 

Com o boom de crescimento com o sucesso de nossa estratégia de comunicação própria no Instagram, ela encontrou o caminho pra finalmente conseguir viabilizar essa visao.

Com o crescimento exponencial, seu marido, um executivo de TI com 12 anos de experiência em vendas B2B em multinacionais nao teve duvidas. Largou a carreira e mergulhou de cabeça nessa empreitada e aqui estamos. Nao sem erros, mas com muita vontade de acertar e ajudar de fato as pessoas

Um core value nosso é que o interesse do cliente sempre vem na frente do nosso. Só recomendamos o negocio se concordarmos que será bom pra todos.  Essa filosofia tem encontrado repercussão entre o publico, carente por um serviço de qualidade, transparente e objetivo

Acreditamos que um negocio imobiliário é primariamente sobre o elemento humano e as emoções envolvidas na compra e venda de um imovel. Pra quem vende, o apego as memorias, pra quem compra, a materialização de um sonho.

E com essa visao, nasceu a Mara Imóveis

Name: Plena Invest
Description:
ZAJMUJĘ SIĘ PROFESJONALNYM OBROTEM NIERUCHOMOŚCIAMI

Działam na rynku nieruchomości od 2019 roku. Przeprowadzam transakcje sprzedaży i najmu nieruchomości zarówno na rynku wtórnym jak i pierwotnym.

Zapraszam Cię do współpracy jeśli chcesz sprawnie i bezpiecznie sprzedać swoją nieruchomość, nie stresując się przy tym przeprowadzaniem procesu transakcji. A jeśli planujesz zakup nieruchomości, chętnie pomogę Ci znaleźć wymarzone 4 kąty, uzyskać kredyt na najkorzystniejszych możliwych warunkach oraz przejść przez całą procedurę zakupu! Zakres terytorialny mojej działalności to Warszawa i okolice oraz Łódź i okolice. W przypadku dużych nieruchomości inwestycyjnych, działam w całym kraju.

Współpracuję ze sprawdzonymi nie jeden raz geodetami, architektami, notariuszami oraz doradcą kredytowym. Jako klient możesz liczyć na zniżki u poleconych przeze mnie specjalistów.

Name: WeserBergland Immobilien
Description:
WeserBergland Immobilien ist Ihr Immobilienmakler für Minden-Lübbecke, Schaumburg & das Weserbergland!

WeserBergland Immobilien ist seit 2013 ein inhabergeführtes Maklerunternehmen aus Porta Westfalica und Ihr Ansprechpartner für die Bewertung und den Verkauf Ihrer Immobilie. Wir bieten Ihnen eine professionelle Vermarktung von Wohn- und Anlageimmobilien in Minden-Lübbecke, Schaumburg, Bückeburg, Herford bis Bielefeld.

Was uns auszeichnet: echte regionale Expertise, persönliche Beratung auf Augenhöhe und ein moderner, digitaler Vermarktungsansatz. Wir verbinden fundierte Marktkenntnis mit innovativen Tools wie KI-gestützten Marktanalysen, professionellen 3D-Renderings, Drohnenaufnahmen, Online-Bewertungen und zielgerichteten Marketingkampagnen – für Eigentümer, die Wert auf messbare Ergebnisse legen.

Unsere Schwerpunkte:
• Privat genutztes Eigentum: Verkauf von Einfamilienhäusern, Eigentumswohnungen & Baugrundstücken
• Investoren / Kapitalanleger: Vermarktung von Mehrfamilienhäusern & Kapitalanlagen
• Immobilienbewertung: Präzise Wertermittlungen nach gutachterlichen Aspekten
• Moderne Präsentation: Foto, Video, 3D & virtuelle Rundgänge
• Ganzheitliche Verkaufsbegleitung bis zum Notartermin

Wir glauben an Transparenz, Zuverlässigkeit und klare Kommunikation. 

Warum Eigentümer uns wählen:
 Über 10 Jahre Markt- & Verhandlungserfahrung
 Starke regionale Präsenz & breites Netzwerk
 Moderne Marketing- und Lead-Strategien
 Hohe Servicequalität durch ein engagiertes Team

Unser Team – Ihre Immobilienexperten:
• Sven Weihe – Inhaber & Immobilienkaufmann (IHK)
• Daniel Behrendt – Immobilienmakler (IHK)
• David Behrendt – Immobilienberater

Unser Ziel: Immobilienverkäufe einfacher, klarer und erfolgreicher machen – für Eigentümer, die Professionalität, Sicherheit und Vertrauen suchen.

WeserBergland Immobilien – Kompetenz trifft Heimatgefühl.

Name: London Realtors
Description:
Dubai’s real estate market is one of the most attractive in the world. With more than 5,700 residential units completed in the third quarter of this year, the city is attracting investors from all around the globe. 

However, as investors are evaluating the leading property market in Dubai, it has become imperative for potential buyers to take advantage of a real estate consultant company. A real estate property consultant, or a property management company, provides clients with detailed insight into the real estate market. 

With property management services, you can learn about the most in-demand projects and constructions in the city. So, whether you want to purchase, sell, or find an off-plan property with huge earning potential, a Dubai property management company can help you learn about the current trends, so you can get a good return on your investment. 

Luxury Real Estate Consultancy Company in Dubai 

Whether you want to invest in residential property for sale in Dubai, or you wish to buy commercial properties in Dubai, London Realtors can help you out. 
The firm started its operations in London’s real estate market, but after gaining significant success in the UK, it expanded its operations to the UAE. In addition to Dubai and London, LDN Realtors extends its services to the USA, KSA, Pakistan and Qatar.

Name: Keller Williams Alesta | KW Cobans
Description:
Gayrimenkul yatırımlarında güvenilir ve profesyonel bir rehber mi arıyorsunuz? 

Ben Gökhan Çoban, Keller Williams Türkiye bünyesinde gayrimenkul danışmanı olarak, yatırım yapmak isteyen müşterilere en uygun çözümleri sunmak için çalışıyorum.  20 yılı aşkın deneyimimle, müşterilerime yalnızca mülk satın alımı ve satışı konusunda değil, aynı zamanda uzun vadeli yatırımlarında stratejik kararlar almalarına yardımcı oluyorum.  Güven, profesyonellik ve müşteri memnuniyeti ilkelerine bağlı kalarak, her adımda en iyi hizmeti vermek için buradayım. 

Emlak sektörüne geçişimden önce, güvenlik sistemleri, POS ve ödeme çözümleri gibi çeşitli teknoloji odaklı alanlarda yöneticilik yaptım.  Bu deneyimlerim, iş dünyasında kazandığım analitik düşünme, müzakere ve müşteri ilişkileri yönetimi gibi becerilerimi pekiştirdi. Keller Williams çatısı altında, bu becerilerimi gayrimenkul sektöründe müşterilerim için avantaja dönüştürüyorum. 

Özlem Çoban ile birlikte kurduğumuz KW Cobans ekibi olarak, gayrimenkul süreçlerinde müşterilerimize aile atmosferini hissettirmeye özen gösteriyoruz.  Her bir yatırımın bir hikayesi olduğuna inanıyor ve her müşterimizle onların ihtiyaçlarına odaklanan kişiselleştirilmiş bir hizmet sunuyoruz. 

Müşterilerimle kurduğum uzun soluklu ilişkiler, güvene dayalı iş birliğinin bir göstergesi.  Sadece bugünkü ihtiyaçlarınızı değil, gelecekteki hedeflerinizi de gözeten çözümler sunmak benim önceliğimdir. 

Hayalinizdeki evi bulmak ya da gayrimenkul portföyünüzü büyütmek için profesyonel bir desteğe ihtiyacınız varsa, benimle iletişime geçin.  Her adımda yanınızda olmak için buradayım!

What we do

Buyer & Investor Advisory: Opportunity sourcing, pricing guidance, due diligence.

Off-Plan & Ready Homes: Access to in-demand launches and high-quality completed assets.

Portfolio Strategy: Yield targeting, diversification, hold/sell timing, exit planning.

End-users seeking a primary or second home, global investors building income portfolios, and business owners expanding into the UAE.

Let’s talk

Serviamo i nostri clienti italiani e internazionali con la massima integrità morale, rispetto e professionalità.

Sempre attento alle condizioni e alle tendenze del mercato, il nostro direttore Fabrizio Brunelli da anni si dedica al mercato immobiliare internazionale che interessa la Riviera, da sempre un luogo che rappresenta uno stile di vita classico e una destinazione turistica sia per gli italiani che per le persone di altri paesi. Negli ultimi anni vi è stato un notevole incremento di acquirenti internazionali che hanno scelto di stabilirsi nella regione apprezzandone la cultura tipicamente italiana, il clima e le splendide coste.

Il nostro ufficio principale si trova nel bellissimo quartiere di Castelletto nella città di Genova, idealmente posizionato al centro della Riviera. Con i nostri agenti di alto profilo professionale, forniamo una copertura territoriale completa da Sanremo alla Versilia e oltre.

Name: NAI Harcourts
Description:
NAI Harcourts was established in mid-2009 by NAI Global and Harcourts International. Both organisations recognised an opportunity to work together to create something special in the New Zealand and Australian commercial property markets. NAI GLOBAL IS the single largest, most powerful global network of owner-operated commercial real estate brokerage firms with over 400 local offices and 7,000+ local market leaders around the world.  

Harcourts is the fastest growing real estate company in the world in 8 countries with over 780 offices with over 5000 consultants. 

NAI Harcourts is the Australasian member of the NAI Global network and the brand under which commercial, industrial and retail property sales and leasing, along with business broking services and asset management, is represented. 

Launched to the market in 2010, NAI Harcourts now boasts an elite team of commercial and industrial sales and leasing specialists and business brokers, based in over 75 locations around Australia and New Zealand  with over 150 professionals and all backed by the international NAI Global network.

In 2013, NAI Harcourts was nominated for one of NAI Global’s most coveted accolades, the Eagle Award, celebrating growth, marketing, vision, and client service at the highest level.
In 2015 NAI Harcourts was awarded international member of the year, one of the top awards for in the NAI Global network for outstanding growth, direction, network and leadership. 

Over the past three years, NAI Harcourts has achieved massive growth, but the team remains focused on delivering an unparalleled service experience to clients. By achieving this, NAI Harcourts has been involved in over 1,700 commercial transactions in the past 12 months, much of which is repeat and referral business.

NAI Harcourts offers a spectrum of real estate services to corporate end users, investors and financial institutions in the commercial property sector locally, nationally and around the world.

Name: Peter van den Top makelaars
Description:
Peter van den Top makelaars, uw vertrouwde gids in de wereld van vastgoedtransacties en investeringen. Met ons gepassioneerde team van vastgoedexperts staan we klaar om u te begeleiden op elke stap van uw vastgoedreis. Of het nu gaat om het vinden van uw droomhuis, het verkopen van uw huidige woning of het uitbreiden van uw investeringsportfolio, wij zijn er om u te ondersteunen.

Onze diensten omvatten begeleiding bij verkoop, aankoop en verhuur van woningen en appartementen, waarbij we streven naar een vlotte en bevredigende transactie voor al onze klanten. Of uw doel nu is om uw woning tegen de best mogelijke prijs te verkopen, uw perfecte thuis te vinden of een geschikte huurwoning te bemachtigen, wij bieden persoonlijke begeleiding en deskundig advies om uw doelen te realiseren.

Daarnaast staan we klaar om beleggers en projectontwikkelaars te begeleiden bij alle fasen van hun projecten. Of u nu een ervaren investeerder bent die zijn portfolio wil diversifiëren of een ontwikkelaar die een nieuw project wil lanceren, wij bieden uitgebreide ondersteuning en expertise om uw investering tot een succes te maken.

Bij Peter van den Top makelaars hechten we veel waarde aan transparante communicatie, integriteit en het opbouwen van langdurige relaties met onze klanten. We luisteren naar uw wensen en behoeften en werken nauw met u samen om op maat gemaakte oplossingen te bieden die aan uw verwachtingen voldoen.

Onze missie is niet alleen om uw vastgoeddoelen te bereiken, maar ook om een blijvende positieve impact te hebben. We streven ernaar om niet alleen een transactie te voltooien, maar om een partner te zijn die u door elke fase van uw vastgoedreis begeleidt.

Name: Gruppo Casapoint
Description:
Gruppo Casapoint è un network immobiliare in continua espansione con più di 20 agenzie in 7 province tra Lombardia ed Emilia-Romagna. Siamo presenti nei territori di Cremona, Brescia, Lodi, Milano, Mantova, Piacenza e Reggio Emilia. 

Noi di Gruppo Casapoint mettiamo le persone al centro. I nostri clienti, ma anche chi lavora con noi: sulle persone si fonda, infatti, la grande crescita che abbiamo registrato in questi anni.

La nostra ricerca di personale, per rispondere all'aumento del volume di affari, è finalizzata a individuare profili con esperienza nel settore commerciale (anche non immobiliare). Non è richiesta la Partita Iva. Formazione di alto livello in azienda. 

Offriamo un ambiente di lavoro sereno e stimolante, possibilità di crescita e di carriera, e abbiamo i turn over più bassi del settore in tutti i ruoli del Gruppo. I nostri dipendenti restano, infatti, a lungo con noi e quasi sempre decidono di costruire con Casapoint un'intera carriera.

Il Gruppo è costituito da una rete di agenzie, collegate tra loro, che condividono, oltre a immobili e servizi, la stessa etica di lavoro. Dopo una lunga esperienza in campo immobiliare, Casapoint nasce nell’aprile del 2012 dall'idea dei soci fondatori di unire le proprie forze in un nuovo progetto: unico, proprio ed indipendente da qualsiasi altro network. Fondamentale punto di partenza per la creazione del Gruppo è stata la condivisone della stessa etica di lavoro, basata su trasparenza, correttezza, semplicità e impegno.

Fin dalla sua creazione Gruppo Casapoint ha attivato a supporto delle agenzie e dei propri agenti un centro servizi che si occupa di:

• formazione continua
• innovazione
• ricerche di mercato
• eventi
• amministrazione

Tutte le agenzie immobiliari di Casapoint fanno parte della Federazione Italiana Mediatori Agenti D’Affari (F.I.M.A.A.).

Name: EDILFIN Agenzia Immobiliare
Description:
L’agenzia immobiliare Edilfin fu fondata nel 1983 da Travagliati Massimo, socio fondatore della FIAIP di Brescia, che dopo circa cinque anni di esperienza nel settore immobiliare decise di creare un proprio studio a Manerba del Garda. 
Nella propria storia Edilfin ha attraversato ben quattro cicli immobiliari con relative crisi, uscendone sempre senza stravolgimenti, grazie alla volontà di operare nel rispetto della miglior etica professionale e guadagnandosi così il rispetto degli operatori di settore e dei clienti. Particolarmente stretto è sempre stato il rapporto con immobiliaristi ed imprenditori operanti in zona, che spesso si sono avvalsi e si avvalgono tuttora della consulenza dell’agenzia prima di pianificare i propri investimenti e progettare i propri cantieri.
Nei quasi quarant’anni di attività Edilfin ha trattato dal semplice appartamento alle più belle ville del lago di Garda, dai locali commerciali agli uffici, dai terreni ai rustici, non mancando in alcune occasioni di occuparsi di clienti Corporate. La società di intermediazione ha inoltre esperienza e competenza in aste e procedure giudiziali, avendo collaborato con diverse figure di settore.
Dal 2016 Edilfin comincia un processo di espansione che la porterà ad entrare in RE/MAX alla fine del 2017, poiché ha trovato in questa struttura il modo per aumentare il proprio organico, nel rispetto della trasparenza e del codice etico professionale, e ampliare la propria area di azione. 
Da Giugno 2018 Edilfin si sposta in una nuova sede, al centro della propria area di azione e predisposta per poter ospitare al meglio i professionisti che ci operano e i propri clienti.
Nel 2019 viene aperta la sede di Salò e nel 2021 la sede di Desenzano.
A gennaio 2024 Edilfin torna ad essere un marchio indipendente.
Nell'estate del 2024, comincia una collaborazione con Belgarda Immobiliare, realtà sita a Peschiera del Garda: questa partnership segna l'espansione dell'agenzia sulla sponda veronese del lago.

Name: Agent Sur Mesure
Description:
Agent sur mesure est un cabinet de conseil qui propose son expertise immobilière et commerciale aux propriétaires vendeurs.
Notre métier consiste à valoriser les biens qui nous sont confiés en appuyant sur leurs points forts et en utilisant une commercialisation sur mesure . 
Nous conseillons et recommandons à nos clients le choix stratégique le plus pertinent en fonction : du temps dont ils disposent, de leurs contraintes mais aussi de leurs attentes de prix .

Notre positionnement sur le marché parisien s'oriente sur deux 2 axes :

Le premier axe : la mise en valeur d'actifs immobiliers.

Pour proposer nos biens à des milliers d'acquéreurs potentiels, nous utilisons tous les outils technologiques à notre disposition, comme par exemple :
Photos professionnelles, visite virtuelles, rapport de commercialisation détaillés, annonce sur les plus grands portails français et internationaux et beaucoup plus encore. 

Le second axe : Un accompagnement complet 
 
Nous confier votre projet, c’est l’assurance d'être accompagné étape par étape. Nous maîtrisons toute la chaîne de transaction aussi bien du côté des vendeurs que du côté des acquéreurs. 
De la constitution du dossier à la finalisation du projet en passant par exemple par l’analyse de la copropriété, le choix d’un notaire ou parfois même le suivi des travaux. 

Notre accompagnement s’adapte aux besoins de nos clients.

Name: Di Mitrio Inmobiliaria
Description:
Puertas abiertas desde 1978. Historia de un estilo

Otros tiempos, otro ritmo, otro paisaje, transitaban La Boca algo más de tres décadas atrás, cuando nacíamos al mercado inmobiliario allá por el año 1978. Desde entonces, nuestras puertas de 20 de Septiembre 314, han estado siempre abiertas para recibir a todos nuestros vecinos con un completo asesoramiento y el máximo nivel en servicios para la compra, venta, alquiler y administración de propiedades.

Dos generaciones de profesionales, un consolidado equipo de ventas y numerosas operaciones realizadas con éxito, constituyen la razón de nuestra trayectoria, liderazgo y permanencia en estos años de respuesta inmobiliaria. Pero básicamente la afirmación de una línea de conducta y una filosofía de trabajo sustentada en el esfuerzo y superación diarios y sobretodo, en el respeto y la valoración del cliente, su tiempo y su confianza.

Y como un modo de crecer, en el año 2006 nos hemos expandido fuera del barrio de La Boca. Hoy nuestras oficinas de San Telmo, en Carlos Calvo 691, próximas a cumplir otro año satisfactorio de puertas abiertas, perfilan ciertamente un promisorio futuro y la rápida aceptación de nuestro estilo, a juzgar por la constante y creciente demanda de consultas y operaciones concretadas tanto por vecinos como por extranjeros.

Estuvimos y seguiremos estando día tras día a su servicio en dos puntos claves de Buenos Aires al Sur, para atenderlo con la calidad que Ud. merece.
Location: Ciudad Autonoma de Buenos Aires, Ciudad Autonoma de Buenos Aires

About Us: 
At Zelloo, our journey began in 2007 much like many of our clients as real estate investors. Fueled by frustration with the dearth of quality property management services and disheartened by the lack of attention our properties received, we took matters into our own hands, venturing into managing our portfolio of vacation rental properties in 2014. Witnessing the tangible improvements in care and efficiency, we saw an opportunity to extend our expertise to fellow property owners in 2016.

Acquisitions:
From those humble beginnings, we've grown expansively through acquisitions; we now operate a real estate brokerage licensed in Florida, Nevada, Texas, and New York, with expansion plans into Arizona and California by Q3 of 2024. We operate our Vacation Rental Management in Hawaii, Nevada, Arizona, Texas, and Florida. Our commitment to excellence in acquiring a technology company in 2021 and other real estate brokerages in 2022 catalyzed the development of a technology-driven brokerage aimed at seamlessly connecting the elite echelon of agents with discerning buyers and sellers.

Investments:
Drawing from our rich experience as real estate investors and property management, particularly within the vacation rental sector, we offer unparalleled market insights that transcend conventional wisdom. At Zelloo, we're not just a service provider; we're your trusted partner in realizing your real estate aspirations.

Name: Von Poll Immobilien Freiburg
Description:
Ihr Immobilienmakler für Freiburg und Umgebung.

Freiburg, das Tor zum Schwarzwald, ist die südlichste Großstadt Deutschlands und Teil des Dreiländerecks Deutschland-Schweiz-Frankreich. Umgeben von Weinbergen ist die Stadt im Breisgau für ihr sonniges und warmes Klima bekannt. Insbesondere durch die Nähe zum Schwarzwald bietet Freiburg viele Möglichkeiten der Naherholung sowie ein großes Sport- und Kulturangebot. Freiburgs Charme zieht jährlich über drei Millionen Besucher an, die vor allem wegen der schönen Altstadt mit dem Münster und der bekannten Bächle kommen.

Die Stadt verfügt über ein hervorragend ausgebautes öffentliches Verkehrsnetz und eine sehr gute Infrastruktur. Die Albert-Ludwigs-Universität wurde im Jahre 1457 gegründet und ist eine der ältesten Universitäten Deutschlands; sie gilt heutzutage als Volluniversität und zählt im bundesweiten Vergleich zur Spitzengruppe. Freiburg liegt unmittelbar an der Bundesautobahn A5 Frankfurt – Basel. In einer Dreiviertelstunde erreicht man den ca. 60 km entfernten Flughafen Basel/Mulhouse und kann so den internationalen Luftverkehr nutzen.

A proud resident of beautiful and diverse Miami Beach, Marco Tiné’s passion is to make his clients happy. With every transaction, Marco’s attention to detail and extensive knowledge of the local real estate market ensures a seamless process, whether he is helping people sell a home, buy a new one, or secure a rental. As for how strongly Marco delivers on this promise, the smiles on his clients’ faces say it all.

Marco’s first venture into real estate was when he began investing in properties in 2002. Shortly thereafter, he became a mortgage broker, before then taking on a more active role in managing some of his properties. Marco’s inside-out knowledge of the Miami region and his inquisitive nature mean he can find clients the right home at the right price, in close proximity to the neighborhood amenities that matter.

A full-time agent since 2014, Marco holds prestigious Guild recognition through his Certified Luxury Home Marketing Specialist (CLHMS) designation. He has also been recognized on an annual basis for his strong sales and productivity. As impressive as his expertise is, Marco’s buyers and sellers are equally inspired by his friendly, outgoing, and honest nature. What you see is what you get with Marco — and he is someone you’ll want to do business with.

Marco is of Venezuelan and Sicilian heritage and has lived in South America and Europe. He enjoys performing charitable work, raising money for Alzheimer’s and cancer organizations, and supporting Clean Miami Beach and Feeding South Florida. Marco also loves running, the gym, and reading, but the most exciting thing on his horizon is impending fatherhood!

The North Shore and More Team: Real Estate, Reinvented! 

At the North Shore and More Team, we understand that buying or selling a home is more than just a transaction—it’s a journey. And like any great journey, you deserve expert guidance every step of the way. Our team isn’t here to “sell” you anything; we’re here to consult, strategize, and deliver results that move you forward.

Why Choose a Team-Based Approach?
Real estate moves fast, and a one-person operation simply isn’t enough. With the North Shore and More Team, you gain the expertise of a dedicated group of Realtors working on your behalf. From in-depth market analysis and strategic negotiation to cutting-edge marketing and seamless transaction coordination, we ensure every detail is handled, every opportunity is maximized, and every challenge is met with a solution.

Our Core Principles
 A Consultative Approach – We listen first. By understanding your unique needs, we craft tailored strategies that deliver smart solutions—not generic sales pitches.

 Relentless Hustle – We don’t just work hard; we work strategically and persistently to secure the best possible results. Whether it’s uncovering hidden opportunities or outmaneuvering the competition, we go the extra mile to win for you.

 Proven Results – With a track record of successful closings, above-market sales, and satisfied clients, our results speak for themselves. We leverage data-driven strategies and expert negotiation to maximize your success.

When you partner with the North Shore and More Team, you’re not just hiring an agent—you’re gaining a team of dedicated Realtors, trusted advisors, and skilled negotiators committed to helping you achieve your real estate goals.

Name: Nybolig Højbjerg & Nybolig Viby-Stavtrup
Description:
2 Nybolig-forretninger, med fokus på salg af alle boligtyper i den sydlige del af Aarhus.
Nybolig Højbjerg dækker Højbjerg, Tranbjerg, Solbjerg og Mårslet
Nybolig Viby-Stavtrup dækker Viby og Stavtrup.
Forretningerne er ejet af Søren Jensen og Peter Dybvad, der startede som indehaver hos Nybolig i 2008 og siden drevet forretningerne succesfuldt.

Nybolig har i Højbjerg været byens mest sælgende ejendomsmægler igennem mere end 20 år, hvor teamet af ejendomsmæglere har været det samme igennem en lang årrække, hvilket har sikret en solid erfaring og et unikt netværk, der er med til at sikre at den gode bolighandel opnås.

I Viby er vi ligeledes områdets mest sælgende ejendomsmægler, hvor vi med samme team som i Højbjerg forretningen sikre vores kunder en rigtig god kvalitet i deres boligsalg.

Skal du købe, sælge eller er du blot nysgerrig omkring bolig markedet står vi altid til din rådighed i vores 2 forretninger.

Vi har lång erfarenhet, hundratals nöjda kunder och en passion för att skapa riktigt bra bostadsaffärer. Hos oss får du en mäklare som ser till att din bostad presenteras på ett sätt som sticker ut. 

Detaljerna spelar roll – och vi vet vilka som gör skillnad.

Vi samler alle nødvendige tjenester ét sted – fra bolighandel, juridisk gennemgang og finansiering til adgang til kompetente håndværkere og leverandører, så boligkøbet eller salget bliver enkelt og problemfrit.

Vores fokus på kundens interesser og vores komplette tilgang betyder, at vores kunder anbefaler os videre - og det er grundlaget for vores succes.
