Name: AEIK Real Estate Boutique
Description:
Contamos com mais de uma década de experiência no mercado imobiliário para grandes negócios off-market. Para responder às necessidades dos nossos clientes nacionais e estrangeiros, decidimos em 2025 ampliar a nossa área de atuação para a mediação tradicional.

Na AEIK, dedicamo-nos à consultoria imobiliária mantendo um compromisso de excelência para com os nossos clientes. Especializados no segmento médio-alto, oferecemos um serviço personalizado e atento às necessidades individuais de cada cliente, garantindo um acompanhamento rigoroso em todas as fases do processo de compra, venda ou arrendamento de imóveis.

Com uma equipa experiente e profundamente conhecedora do mercado imobiliário, a AEIK distingue-se pela sua abordagem estratégica e inovadora. A nossa missão é proporcionar soluções eficazes e adaptadas às exigências do setor, combinando profissionalismo, transparência e uma visão orientada para os melhores resultados.

Seja para habitação própria, investimento ou qualquer outro objetivo, estamos aqui para garantir que cada transação imobiliária seja uma experiência segura, eficiente e gratificante. Distinguimo-nos ainda pela abrangência dos serviços prestados, aliando à mediação tradicional, um serviço de Concierge imobiliário, englobando todas as necessidades resultantes do processo da compra ou da venda do seu imóvel.

E porque valorizamos os nossos clientes, estabelecemos uma parceria estratégica com a TOTE SER. Uma empresa que desenvolve negócios na área do imobiliário, proporcionando serviços de projetos de arquitetura, licenciamentos e legalizações, gestão e fiscalização de obra, design de interiores e gestão de património.

Destacamos o programa Proprietário Mais Com Menos, um serviço inédito e inovador que alia proprietários, investidores e a TOTE SER com o único objetivo: a máxima rentabilização do património imobiliário.

Name: Mayerl Immobilien
Description:
𝗧𝗥𝗔𝗗𝗜𝗧𝗜𝗢𝗡𝗦𝗨𝗡𝗧𝗘𝗥𝗡𝗘𝗛𝗠𝗘𝗡 𝗦𝗘𝗜𝗧 𝗠𝗘𝗛𝗥 𝗔𝗟𝗦 70 𝗝𝗔𝗛𝗥𝗘𝗡

Nichts ist so konstant wie der Wandel, heißt es – und tatsächlich: Seitdem Hildegard Mayerl 1954 ihr eigenes Unternehmen gründete, sich als erste und damals einzige Frau in der Wiener Immobilienbranche etablierte, hat sich so gut wie alles verändert: die Beatles, die Doors, der Falco und der Jackson, Peace and Love und Perestroika, Viertelanschluss, Fax und VHS-Recorder – all das kam und ging, während die Realkanzlei Hildegard Mayerl blieb.

Als sich die Firmengründerin 2001 zur Ruhe setzte, verließ eines der bekanntesten Gesichter die Wiener Immobilienwirtschaft. Für viele war sie die Grande Dame der Branche, die erste Adresse, wenn es um ausgesuchte Bestlagen für anspruchsvollste Kunden ging.

Heute steht Eva Krulis an der Spitze und führt das Traditionsunternehmen erfolgreich in die Zukunft. Nach 30 gemeinsamen Jahren war sie zur engsten Vertrauten und legitimen Nachfolgerin von Hildegard Mayerl geworden und bewahrt seither mit größter Hingabe die Werte, die seit 65 Jahren Kern des Unternehmenserfolges sind.

Mayerl Immobilien bleibt aber vor allem eins: Ihre erste Adresse für exquisite Bestlagen.

Description:
Atopary Properties is a wholly-owned Ghanaian Real Estate and Property Management Company that has been in business for the past 4years but was incorporated in 2020 for the business of marketing, selling, renting, and managing of both residential and commercial properties.

Our main aim is to provide quality housing for lower, middle, and high-income earners with little or no stress at comparable lower rates.

The Real Estate Industry in Ghana.
Ghana’s real estate industry has seen significant growth in the last couple of years. This has been due to an increase in demand for both residential and industrial properties.
The Ghanaian real estate industry is controlled by various industry players, the most significant amongst them being; Real estate agents, Developers, Landlords and Homeowners.

For the purposes of our business, we will focus on Real estate agents.
The Ghanaian real estate market in many ways is sustained by real estate agents. Developers and homeowners rely on them to rent or sell their properties, Searchers rely on them for properties that suit their taste, they help determine the prices of homes particularly for homeowners due to their extensive knowledge and experience of the industry.

Con CENTURY 21 Canaletto verrete seguiti da professionisti, tecnici e consulenti preparati e competenti che daranno il massimo valore ai vostri investimenti e le vostre necessità.

Jesteśmy butikową agencją nieruchomości we Wrocławiu oraz Dubaju. Specjalizujemy się w sprzedaży i zakupie nieruchomości z segmentu premium.
W dzisiejszych czasach, aby zyskownie sprzedać nieruchomość wystawienie ogłoszenia na typowe portale ogłoszeniowe to za mało. Przynajmniej nasze biuro tak nie działa. Dajemy naszym klientom wartość, pomysł, indywidualne podejście, strategię działania, rozbudowane oraz spersonalizowane działania marketingowe. Aby uzyskać najwyższą cenę i możliwie największe zainteresowanie ofertą działamy na wielu płaszczyznach. Strategię sprzedaży zawsze tworzymy od nowa, w oparciu o cel i wymagania właściciela, wykorzystując potencjał nieruchomości, z dostosowaniem do aktualnej sytuacji na rynku. Przygotowujemy odpowiednio nieruchomości pod kątem wizualnym m.in. odświeżenie, naprawę drobnych uszkodzeń czy ocieplenie wnętrza tkaninami, dodatkami, stylowymi detalami. Do każdej sprzedaży przygotowujemy również profesjonalne sesje zdjęciowe (które notabene bardzo często pojawiają się w magazynach wnętrzarskich), produkcje filmowe, dni otwarte czy spersonalizowane kampanie sprzedażowe.
Często sprzedajemy nieruchomości w systemie off market, czyli niedostępne na typowych portalach ogłoszeniowych.

Name: Iowa CCIM Chapter
Description:
CCIM (Certified Commercial Investment Member) is a recognized expert in the commercial and investment real estate industry. The CCIM lapel pin is earned after successfully completing a designation process that ensures CCIMs are proficient not only in theory, but also in practice. This elite corps of CCIMs includes brokers, leasing professionals, investment counselors, asset managers, appraisers, corporate real estate executives, property managers, developers, institutional investors, commercial lenders, attorneys, bankers, and other allied professionals.

￼

A CCIM is part of a global commercial real estate network with members across North America and more than 30 countries. This professional network has enabled CCIM members to close thousands of transactions annually, representing more than $200 billion in value. As a result, the experts who possess the CCIM designation are an invaluable resource for commercial real estate owners, investors, and users.

CCIMs have completed a designation curriculum that covers essential CCIM skill sets including ethics, interest-based negotiation, financial analysis, market analysis, user decision analysis, and investment analysis for commercial investment real estate. CCIMs have completed a portfolio demonstrating the depth of their commercial real estate experience. Finally, they have demonstrated their proficiency in the CCIM skill sets by successfully completing a comprehensive examination. Only then is a designation candidate awarded the coveted CCIM pin, joining the ranks of highly skilled commercial and investment real estate experts.

Name: MYPIOLE
Description:
Mypiole, une start-up africaine innovante, se positionne comme une solution de pointe dans le secteur immobilier en Afrique, s'attaquant au problème pressant du logement décent sur le continent. Face aux défis persistants liés à la recherche de biens immobiliers fiables, Mypiole émerge en tant que plateforme numérique novatrice visant à simplifier et à transformer l'expérience immobilière pour les individus, les familles et les entreprises, déplacé interne.µ


Le principal problème auquel Mypiole s'attaque est l'accès limité au logement décent en Afrique. Les procédures complexes, les informations peu fiables, et le manque de transparence dans le secteur immobilier ont créé un environnement où la recherche de propriétés devient souvent une tâche ardue. Les propriétaires ont du mal à trouver des locataires ou des acheteurs, et les individus peinent à trouver des biens qui répondent à leurs besoins spécifiques.
Mypiole agit comme un catalyseur de changement en connectant de manière transparente les propriétaires, les agents immobiliers, les acquéreurs potentiels et les volontaires qui sont des personnes lambda qui peuvent gagner quelque commission en partageant de l’information sur des opportunités immobilières. Créant ainsi une communauté bienveillante pour le partage de l’information.  La plateforme offre une vitrine gratuite pour les biens immobiliers, permettant aux propriétaires de présenter leurs propriétés de manière attrayante. Grâce à un filtrage intelligent et des fonctionnalités de recherche avancées, les utilisateurs peuvent trouver rapidement des biens qui correspondent à leurs critères, réduisant ainsi le temps et les dépenses liés à la recherche immobilière. Une mise en valeur du service de colocation ; hôtel ; espace co-working, fonds de commerce, espace agricole ou d’élevage bref un ensemble de service immobilier disponible en un seul clic
Un autre aspect unique de Mypiole réside dans son engagement envers des pratiques éco-responsables.

Nybolig Development Viborg er den fortrukne samarbejdspartner, både når gælder salg eller udlejning af boligprojekter i Viborg Kommune.

Vi er den eneste lokale projektafdeling og sætter en ære i at være en troværdig, seriøs og resultatorienteret sparringspartner for projektudviklere og entreprenører.

Gennem de sidste 9 år har vi været Viborg Kommunes mest sælgende ejendomsmægler. Dette gør sig gældende både på det ”brugte” marked, men også fsv. boligprojekter.

I vores optik har vi samlet ikke kun Viborgs største, men også Viborgs bedste hold, til at håndtere projektsalg og udlejning, hvilket giver os en unik stor berøringsflade og knowhow, når det kommer til at løse hver opgave vi påtager os.

Vi vil gerne tages med på råd tidligt i processen og invitere gerne på en kaffe og en snak, når det passer dig.

Ring eller skriv til os på:

Projektchef Henrik Gottschalck – 2345 7908 / hvg@nybolig.dk

Name: INNOVA REAL ESTATE PUNTA CANA
Description:
Con INNOVA REAL ESTATE PUNTA CANA consigo disfrutar de ayudar a todo el mundo a invertir en Punta Cana. 
Es un paraíso terrestre a nivel de naturaleza y playas, pero también es un paraíso para inversores  del mundo entero, de todo niveles.
Las razones principales que hacen que Punta Cana es hoy el destino #1 para los inversores en las Américas ( y otras partes del mundo):

- Alta demanda turística, paraíso vacacional
- Estabilidad económica y crecimiento sostenible
- Incentivos fiscales y facilidades para los inversionistas (hasta 15 años sin impuesto de 
   propiedad, y mas ...)
- Sector inmobiliario en constante crecimiento por la demanda con  construcciones de alta 
   calidad, con complejos turísticos exclusivos y atractivos para el alquiler vacacional
- Seguridad, legalidad  y transparencia en las transacciones inmobiliarias
- Punta Cana en constante desarrollo ofrece un gran variedad de actividades de ocio, 
   campos de golfs, restaurantes centros comerciales y excursiones inolvidables.

Acompaño pequeños inversores o grandes inversores al igual.
Soy distribuidor de los principales desarrolladores de Punta Cana (serios y consolidados).

Garantizo el cuidado y la dedicación deseada a l'asesoramiento de una inversión de un apartamento de 76.000$ al igual que para un inversión millonaria, cuidando detalles, contratos, compromisos legales y jurídicos.
Busco soluciones de financiamiento para todo los bolsillos, si necesario.
Tengo acuerdo de financiaciones con los desarrolladores por parte o totalidad de los proyectos inmobiliarios propuestos, sin intereses y descuento según las aportaciones económicas.

Estamos en un paraíso de inversión, es el momento idóneo.
Tengo terrenos a orilla del mar para parcelas con retorno del 300% o construir una villa o un complejo residencial de 100 a 500 apartamentos o hoteles de hasta 1.000 habitaciones.
Tengo oportunidades de inversión para promotores con un retorno de inversion del 200% en 2 años y el 500% a 4 años Inicial 2.M$

Name: 7Hills Lisbon Realty
Description:
A cidade de Lisboa, capital de Portugal, é frequentemente associada às suas sete colinas, que desempenharam um papel fundamental na sua evolução histórica.


A designação "cidade das sete colinas" remonta a tempos antigos, destacando as elevações naturais que definiram a paisagem urbana e influenciaram o seu desenvolvimento. As colinas - São Jorge, São Vicente, Sant'Ana, Santo André, Chagas, Santa Catarina e Estrela - oferecem não uma topografia única e um skyline ímpar entre as cidades da Europa.


A localização estratégica de cada uma das colinas influenciou a defesa e o planeamento urbano ao longo dos séculos. Cada colina possui características distintas, desde a colina de São Vicente, mais a Nascente, outrora o local da cidade com mais água devido ás suas nascentes, até à colina de Santa Catarina, local de eleição para o melhor sunset de Lisboa. A interação entre as colinas também moldou a paisagem urbana de Lisboa, tornando-a numa cidade rica em história e caráter. 


É neste espírito que batizámos a nossa equipa como "7 Hills Lisbon Realtors". Uma homenagem sincera à cidade, à sua história multifacetada e às características únicas que a moldaram.


Tal como as colinas desempenharam um papel vital na construção de Lisboa, estamos empenhados em ajudar os nossos clientes nacionais e internacionais a encontrar soluções imobiliárias que se ajustem às suas necessidades e objetivos, refletindo a diversidade e a beleza desta nossa cidade inspiradora.

Diese Erfahrung bringen wir hiermit vollumfänglich in die Vermittlung von ausgewählten besonderen Immobilien in ganz Kroatien mit ein.

Auf unserer Webseite finden Sie die schönsten und außergewöhnlichsten Immobilien Kroatiens, welche zum Verkauf stehen oder für Ihren außergewöhnlichsten Urlaub gebucht werden können. Die gesamten angebotenen Immobilien und Partner in Kroatien werden von unserem deutschen Immobilienbüro einer strengen professionellen Prüfung unterzogen und nur ins Portfolio aufgenommen, wenn die gesamten erforderlichen Dokumente und Grundbucheinträge vorhanden sind, bzw. bei Mietobjekten diese durch seriöse Vermieter oder Agenturen angeboten werden. Sie werden von uns über den gesamten Verkaufsprozess hinweg begleitet, wir organisieren die Besichtigung und begleiten Sie persönlich über den gesamten Zeitraum - von der ersten Anfrage bis zur Vertragsunterzeichnung und darüber hinaus. Selbstverständlich suchen wir für unsere deutschsprachigen Kunden auch Immobilien in ganz Kroatien nach ihren ganz persönlichen Vorstellungen.

Durch unsere kroatischen Spar- und Rechtskenntnisse ist sichergestellt, dass Sie von Ihrer ersten Anfrage bis zum Vertragsabschluss bestmöglich betreut werden.Unser Anliegen ist es, für unsere deutschsprachigen Kunden die bestmögliche Immobilie zu finden,

Description:
Safcom Properties is the name chosen by our team of passionate property professionals. Our team consists of individuals who are eager to share their knowledge and skills in commercial property. Our primary focus is commercial property leasing, sales and property management.
Each member has chosen an area which they are intimately involving themselves by integrating within businesses within their area of choice. Our online platforms allow our team to operate remotely and it is no surprise you will see them when you find yourself in the area. Their area is their workplace. If we are not on the road you can visit us at our office in Century City where you will be warmly welcomed.
We take a personal approach to property management, sharing a relationship where success is shared. We take responsibility for of both single and multi-tenanted office, industrial and retail buildings predominantly in Century City and Tyger Valley, Cape Town. Our commitment is to provide a personal approach to each business with continued realisation of the importance that goes into understanding a business and that the premises the business operates provides the foundational platform for its success.
Unlike the residential market, the commercial property industry can be highly variable, often with a multitude of competing interests at play. This creates difficulty when it comes to gathering the information required to make like-for-like comparisons when weighing up property options. This can turn the property procurement process into a frustrating and time-consuming task. Solving this ongoing problem is where Safcom Properties creates value by forming a vital link in the information/communication chain between tenant, landlord, buyer, seller, managing entity and other stakeholders. We have developed and are continually managing a comprehensive property knowledge database, forming relationships with property owners and their tenants in the process.

En Hogarea creemos que un sector tan importante como el inmobiliario debía reescribirse desde la base. Por eso diseñamos cada proceso pensando primero en las personas y no solo en las propiedades.

Nuestro trabajo no se basa en letra pequeña ni promesas vacías: ofrecemos acuerdos claros, resultados medibles y un acompañamiento real. Porque construir hogar es mucho más que cerrar tratos: es cerrar una etapa y abrir otra juntos.

Con más de 1.500 familias asesoradas y 20 años de experiencia, somos reconocidos por:
- Honestidad y comunicación transparente.
- Profesionalidad de un equipo multidisciplinar.
- Excelencia y mejora continua.
- Cercanía y empatía para generar relaciones duraderas.

Además, integramos una estrategia de marketing avanzada con:
- Fotografía profesional, planos 2D/3D y renders para mostrar el potencial de cada propiedad.
- Marketing digital con estrategias personalizadas.
- Publicaciones en los 10 principales portales nacionales e internacionales.
- Difusión y marketing multicanal con herramientas digitales y redes sociales.
- Tecnología Proptech y procesos ágiles que garantizan seguridad y eficiencia.

Departamentos especializados:
- Grandes Patrimonios: asesoramiento integral y confidencial para propietarios de carteras inmobiliarias.
- Red de Afiliados: colaboración con profesionales y empresas de confianza que comparten nuestros valores.

En Hogarea cuidamos cada detalle para que propietarios y compradores vivan un proceso seguro, transparente y exitoso.

Creamos confianza. Creamos hogares.

Name: EMLAK MAKİNESİ
Description:
Türkiye'deki emlak sektörü, son yıllarda önemli bir büyüme ve gelişme göstermiştir. İnşaat projelerinin artışı, yabancı yatırımcıların ilgisi ve kentsel dönüşüm projeleri, sektörü canlı tutmaktadır. Ancak, bu rekabetçi ortamda başarılı olmak için, emlak işletmelerinin mükemmel değerleme yöntemleri ve müşteri memnuniyetine odaklanarak zamanında satışlar yapması gerekmektedir.

Mükemmel Değerleme

Emlak işletmeleri, gayrimenkulün doğru bir şekilde değerlendirilmesinin önemini kavramalıdır. Yanlış bir değerlendirme, hem satıcı hem de alıcı için olumsuz sonuçlara yol açabilir ve müşteri güvenini zedeleyebilir. Ele aldığımız portföylerde piyasa araştırması, emlak uzmanlarımızın değerlendirmeleri ve veri analizi, emlakın durumu ve özellikleri ele alınarak en doğru değerleme hedeflenmektedir. 

Emlak sektöründe başarılı olmak, sadece doğru değerleme yapmakla kalmaz, aynı zamanda müşterilere hızlı ve verimli bir şekilde satış yapmayı da içerir.  Profesyonel pazarlama, etkili iletişim, esnek fiyatlandırma stratejilerimiz ile doğru zamanda satış önceliğimizdir. 

Nişantaşı, Etiler, Ulus, Arnavutköy, Bebek, İstinye, Tarabya, Zekeriyaköy, Sirkeci, Beyoğlu, Kemerburgaz ve Göktürk lokasyonlarında müşteri İhtiyaçlarını Anlama, Şeffaflık ve Güvenilirlik ve Sonrasında Destek anlayışımız ile bu süreçte hem yanınızda hem da arkanızdayız.

Name: MREE - Minnesota Real Estate Exchangors
Description:
MREE is about Networking and Deal Making!
Some may consider attending networking meetings of little value in this 'Electronic Age' because real estate information so easily accessed. Many take it for granted that they can do their investigations and make their decisions on a desktop. How wrong-headed is that?

Lack of ‘personal contact’ is the missing ingredient and a major reason many deals do not get done. “Real Estate is a Contact Sport”.  

MREE has members with widely diverse backgrounds, e.g.: investors, sellers, buyers, real estate licensees, attorneys, title companies, experts at 1031’s, bankers and the list goes on in other specialties. At a MREE Event, you’ll interact with more people and often hear about more deals at one meeting than you will the rest of your week. If you are serious about real estate investment and doing transactions you need to be a MREE member.

MREE meets twice a month to share opportunities, exchange useful information, get educated on important topics and interact with others  ‘Face-to-Face’. If MREE Members do not know how to help, they know someone who can help.

Name: ACCION RAIZ
Description:
Somos una empresa líder en democratizar la inversión en finca raíz al dividir propiedades en acciones de igual valor. Nuestro enfoque innovador permite que inversores de todos los niveles participen y obtengan beneficios. Nos especializamos en el sector HORECA (Hoteles, Restaurantes y Cafés) y contamos con expertos en este campo.

Nuestro objetivo principal es brindar acceso equitativo a las oportunidades de inversión en el mercado inmobiliario. A través de la división de propiedades en acciones, permitimos que los inversores elijan el tipo de inversión que mejor se adapte a sus necesidades y metas financieras. Esto proporciona flexibilidad y diversificación en sus carteras.

Valoramos la transparencia y la confianza en nuestras relaciones comerciales. Proporcionamos información detallada y actualizada sobre nuestras inversiones, junto con informes periódicos de rendimiento. Esto permite a los accionistas tomar decisiones informadas y evaluar el progreso de sus inversiones.

En el sector HORECA, aprovechamos nuestra experiencia y conocimiento para identificar las mejores oportunidades de inversión. Evaluamos cuidadosamente las propiedades relacionadas con hoteles, restaurantes y cafés, y buscamos aquellas con un potencial sólido de rentabilidad y generación de dividendos.

Nuestro compromiso es ofrecer a nuestros accionistas oportunidades de crecimiento financiero sólidas y sostenibles. Buscamos crear una comunidad de inversores comprometidos con la inversión en finca raíz y el sector HORECA. Al unirse a nosotros, los inversores se benefician de nuestra experiencia, transparencia y dedicación a maximizar sus inversiones.

Name: VON POLL REAL ESTATE SALÒ
Description:
Kennst du das Land, wo die Zitronen blühn
Johann Wolfgang von Goethe (1749–1832)
Es gehört zu den berühmtesten Gedichten deutscher Sprache und besingt die unter Deutschen verbreitete Italiensehnsucht

Der Gardasee ist mehr denn je, einer der beliebtesten Urlaubsorte für Menschen, nicht nur mehr aus den D-A-CH Regionen. Seine Ruhe hat seit jeher rastlose Geister angezogen, wie den des Dichters Gabriele D'Annunzio, der hier sein Vittoriale degli Italiani errichtete. Im Sommer sind seine Ufer von Touristen, vor allem aus Nordeuropa, bevölkert, die es für das "schönste Meer Italiens" halten.
Die charmante Verbindung aus spektakulärer Bergkulisse, mit dem über 2000 Meter hohen Monte Baldo an der Ostküste, der unberührten Natur auf dem Hochplateau "Alto Lago di Garda"an der Westküste und dem mediterranen Flair im Süden, zwischen Oliven- und Zitronenbäumen, fasziniert Menschen aus aller Herren Länder. Dazu das glitzernde Blau des Sees und professionellem Yachtservice für Liebhaber von Riva und Frauscher-Luxusbooten.
Rund um den Gardasee gibt es 17 Michelin-Sterne-Restaurants und 10 Golfplätze, die ganzjährige Spielfreude in mediterraner Hügellandschaft, eingebettet in Weinberge und Zypressenhügel bieten.

Salò liegt an der Westküste in der Region Lombardei, in der Provinz Brescia und hat ca. 10.000 Einwohner.
In einer geschützten schmalen und malerischen Bucht liegt das authentische Städtchen an einer prachtvollen Uferpromenade, am südwestlichen Ufer des Sees. Die stilvolle Altstadt mit Fußgängerzone und vielen kleinen Boutiquen bekannter italienischer Designer bietet hochwertiges Shoppingvergnügen und in den zahlreichen Restaurants, kann man hervorragende Fischspezialitäten und ausgezeichnete Weine genießen.
Am Von Poll Real Estate Standort in Salò bieten wir unserer Kundschaft die Möglichkeit, auf deutscher, englischer und italienischer Sprache eine kostenlose Beratung in Anspruch zu nehmen. 
#Verlässlichkeit  #Begeisterung #Bestleistung

Name: Oikos Immobiliare
Description:
Oikos Immobiliare è un'agenzia specializzata nella vendita e intermediazione di immobili in Puglia, con un ampio portafoglio che comprende case, ville e appartamenti. L'agenzia offre un servizio completo a chi desidera acquistare, vendere o investire nel settore immobiliare, sia in Italia che all'estero. L'attività è focalizzata principalmente in Puglia, una delle regioni più richieste per chi cerca bellezze naturali e qualità della vita, con particolare attenzione alle province di Brindisi, Taranto e Lecce.
Oikos Immobiliare dispone di un'ampia selezione di immobili, dalle case tradizionali pugliesi in campagna alle moderne ville con vista sul mare e appartamenti situati nei centri storici. Grazie alla profonda conoscenza del territorio, viene fornita consulenza e assistenza in ogni fase della compravendita, per garantire che ogni esigenza sia soddisfatta.
Oltre alla compravendita, l'agenzia si occupa anche di consulenza patrimoniale per ottimizzare il rendimento delle proprietà, offrendo la possibilità di inserire gli immobili sul mercato degli affitti settimanali. Questo servizio rappresenta un'opportunità interessante per generare un'entrata aggiuntiva durante le stagioni turistiche, grazie all’elevata domanda di soggiorni in Puglia da parte di visitatori italiani e internazionali.
Oikos Immobiliare supporta inoltre coloro che desiderano investire all'estero, selezionando opportunità con rendita garantita e collaborando con partner internazionali di fiducia. Questo permette di rendere l'acquisto di un immobile all'estero semplice e sicuro, con il vantaggio di una consulenza continua durante tutto il processo.
Affidarsi a Oikos Immobiliare significa scegliere un partner che lavora con dedizione e professionalità, garantendo un'esperienza senza complicazioni per trovare l'immobile ideale o la migliore opportunità di investimento.

Name: Greater Dayton Realtist Association (GDRA)
Description:
We are PROUD to be REALTIST! 

Vision: To be recognized as a source of empowerment for economic development in the communities we serve.

Mission: To promote "Democracy in Housing" by advocating for the underserved through education, leadership, and service. 

The Greater Dayton REALTIST Association is a member of  the National Association of Real Estate Brokers, Incorporated NAREB, the oldest minority real estate trade association in America. Members of the NAREB organization are known as REALTIST. Although composed principally of African Americans and other minority real estate professionals, the REALTIST organization is an integrated entity open to all qualified practitioners who are committed to achieving the ideals of the REALTIST creed “Democracy in Housing”.
 
The REALTIST has made substantial contributions to the cause of democracy by working to provide housing for all without limitations or restrictions. They remain true to the dual mission of serving the underserved and developing creative and effective methods of rendering such service. Through their work on civic, political and business programs, REALTIST have become the voice and conscience of proponents of equal housing opportunities for all citizens. NAREB will continue to pave the way for all citizens to be decently housed and to make cities and states of this nation even better places in which to live.

Name: Persimmon & Cross, REALTORS
Description:
At Persimmon & Cross, REALTORS we believe in the power of community and the profound impact a safe and nurturing environment can have on one's life. Our name is derived from the very corner where our founder's journey began - a place where his great aunt gave a small parcel of land to his mother, allowing her to create a home that fostered love, security, and a strong sense of belonging for him as a child.  

Inspired by the values he learned from his upbringing, our founder established Persimmon & Cross, REALTORS with a clear mission: To provide comprehensive real estate advice built on a foundation of the highest ethical standards.

Our brokerage is committed to providing personalized attention, honest advice, and expert guidance throughout every step of the real estate transaction process. We are dedicated to building a legacy of trust, integrity, and excellence, just as our founder's mother did on that cherished piece of land near the corner of Persimmon & Cross.   

Join us on this extraordinary journey as we help you find a place to call home and embrace the power of community.

Powered by Fathom Realty

Mr. Key, çağdaş, işini seven, iyi ahlaklı, karşılıklı saygıya önem veren, işinin ehli bir ekibin en net ifadesi olmuştur. Teknoloji ve inovasyonu yönetebilen ve ekibi ile her çalışmasını iç iletişime taşıyarak entegre halinde hareket edip, müşterisine ve topluma katkı sağlayan bir kurumdur.

Name: Équipe Étienne Lessard, Courtiers immobiliers
Description:
Vous travaillez déjà très fort et la vente d’une propriété demande un important investissement de temps et d’énergie. Je vous aiderai donc à sauver du temps et réduire votre stress en prenant en charge toute la mise en marché : marketing, visites, inspection, financement, notaire, service après-vente…Votre rôle dans le processus de vente sera de fournir certains documents, présenter votre propriété sous son plus beau jour, écouter les conseils, être ouvert aux recommandations, prendre les décisions nécessaires et profiter de vos soirées et fins de semaines.

J’ai négocié plusieurs transactions chaque année pour un total de plus de 2000 dans ma carrière. En tenant compte des circonstances propres à chaque transaction, je mets toute mon expertise à votre disposition pour aider, conseiller, rassurer, planifier, valider, simplifier, communiquer, protéger et maximiser votre négociation. De plus, ma grande connaissance de différente stratégie (promesse d’achat, contre-proposition à deux volets, promesse d’achats multiples, surenchères, promesse d’achat conditionnelle à la vente d’une autre propriété…) vous permettra de trouver des solutions pratiques aux éventuels problèmes reliés à une transaction et vous permettra d’éviter de regrettables ennuis d’ordre juridique.

Vous avez surement remarqué beaucoup d’ajouts « VENDU » sur nos enseignes. Ce n’est pas un hasard; en plus des nombreuses heures investies en conseils et négociations, je vous offre un plan de publicité inégalé : journaux de quartier, publicité radio, site Internet avant-gardiste, dépliants, enseignes, réseaux sociaux (Facebook, Instagram) etc. Tout est mis en place pour que tous les acheteurs potentiels voient les propriétés des vendeurs que je représente. 

Choisir Étienne Lessard, c'est choisir une équipe jeune et dynamique qui performe année après année parmi l'élite en immobilier à travers la province.

Voor een professionele verkoop- of aankoopmakelaar bent u bij De 4 Linden Makelaardij aan het juiste adres!

Nieuwsgierig naar bedrijfsonroerendgoed of een taxatie van uw woning nodig? Neem gerust contact op met de deskundige makelaars van De 4 Linden Makelaardij!

Als lid van de NVM werken we volgens de strengste kwaliteitseisen. Dat we hierin succesvol zijn, blijkt onder andere uit onze reviews en de onderscheiding voor ‘Beste Makelaar van Flevoland’ in 2018, 2019 en 2020. Daarbij werken we bij de verkoop van uw woning met 100% No cure No pay. Bent u niet tevreden? Dan kost het u niets. Maak snel een vrijblijvende afspraak met één van onze makelaars in Almere of Lelystad. U bent van harte welkom!

Name: oneBroker
Description:
oneBroker is a startup with a mission to revolutionize the real estate industry through the use of data-driven technology working alongside the local engagement model. We are building a platform that will be representing us as the sole broker or lister, property owners, and individuals looking for options in this business with one easy-to-use interface app, assisting both end users get to their preferred option in a faster, convenient manner.

The selection, exercise, finalization of the deal and finally shifting-in is a commitment demanding days if not weeks of one’s busy schedule. We plan on minimizing this demand and sticking to fixed commitments to help you summarize and close this process in a swifter manner while taking that one extra step for you through the process. Further, in future we strive to provide and enable options for maintenance, security needs, shifting help, managerial services catering to property lookouts, property management services and much more all at the convenience of one application on your phone.

OneBroker has taken on challenges far greater than those that have been answered by all the new and already available application based options in our market. The vision and solutions we aim to bring in would definitely be solving a much ignored everyday hassle any interested party has to go-through when dealing in this line of business. We aim to reach out to customer’s requirements curated and prepared for them before they may even have a need for one & change the entire approach of this market.

We will not enter into the broker-less model and rather go for brokerage-less and fixed brokerage model which allows every user to retain the services and comfort an agent brings in whilst looking-out for out in their best interests. A pure customer centric real estate solution in one application.

Name: Leonardo Group Deutschland
Description:
Die Leonardo Group mit Ihrem Hauptsitz auf der Königsallee im Herzen von Düsseldorf, betreibt bereits seit 1986 Gastronomie an Deutschlands Top-Standorten. Neben der Systemgastronomie, die eine der wirtschaftlich stärksten Säulen bildet, unterhält die Leonardo Group in Eigenregie rund 25 Betriebe. Dazu gehören Restaurants, Cafés, Bars und Hotellerie. Manche von ihnen beleben durch ihr gehobenes Angebot, das gastronomische Leben auf der Düsseldorfer Königsallee. Somit werden auch im eigenen Team kreative Konzepte entwickelt, ein kompletter Ladenbau mit Umsetzung geplant und zukunftsorientierte Marketingstrategien erfolgreich auf den Markt gebracht. 

Dank der starken Präsenz in der Gastronomie ist die Leonardo Group mit dem Immobilienmarkt sehr vertraut. Durch langjährige Erfahrung und ein bestehendes Netzwerk aus geeigneten Hotspots und attraktiven Standorten in der Metropolregion rund um Düsseldorf, ist die Vermittlung, der An- und Verkauf von Privat - und Geschäftsimmobilien als auch allen Themen rund um das Immobilienvorhaben von hoher Relevanz. 

Durch optimales Retailmanagement schafft es die Leonardo Group jedes Projekt von der Konzeption bis zur Schlüsselübergabe, wettbewerbsfähig aufzubauen. Die übergreifende Kundenbetreuung und das Eingreifen verschiedener Maßnahmen sind Faktoren, welche an oberster Stelle stehen und so den Unternehmenserfolg versprechen.

Name: BoligOne Stine Kronvold
Description:
I 2023 har Roskilde igen fået en lokal BoligOne-ejendomsmægler. 

Vi er en uafhængig ejendomsmæglerkæde og dermed ikke afhængig af nogen samarbejdspartnere. For dig som sælger betyder det, at vi har 100% fokus på et godt salg af din bolig. 

Hos os brænder vi for den gode ejendomshandel, hvorfor du kan forvente en personlig, dedikeret og kompetent mægler, der alene arbejder for salget af DIN bolig. 

Kort sagt fører vi dig trygt, sikkert og professionelt igennem din ejendomshandel.

Og så er vi naturligvis medlem af Dansk Ejendomsmæglerforening.

Bag virksomheden i Roskilde står Stine Kronvold, som er født og opvokset i Roskilde og derfor kender byen rigtig godt. 
Stine blev uddannet ejendomsmægler for snart 25 år siden, hos en af de lokale mæglere i byen, og har siden, via sit virke som mægler, også fået et godt kendskab til områderne i Hornsherred, Lejre og Odsherred kommune.

Spędzając tysiące godzin na rozmowie z klientem, budując strukturę i zarządzając nią wiemy, że efekty osiągamy tylko wtedy, kiedy stosujemy indywidualne podejście do danego tematu. Name: Realty Investment Association of California (RIAOC)
Description:
RIAOC stands for Realty Investment Association of California. The organization is comprised of brokers, investors, and real estate service providers - with focus on CRE (commercial real estate). The weekly meetings revolve around learning, networking, and pitching their listings.

In 1968, a small group of investment specialists led by Art Turner and Woody Johnson formed the Investment Division of the East Orange County Board of Realtors to share ideas and cooperate in marketing investment properties. Today, RIAOC members come from several Southern California counties where our motto is "Success Through Cooperation".

The Association provides for the dissemination of information regarding investment real estate and business opportunities. We also provide education through financial, legal, legislative, and technological updates, courses, and seminars on investment real estate and related subjects. We promote cooperation among real estate agents, maintain high standards of conduct and professionalism, and protect individual rights of real estate investment and property ownership.

If you are a licensed real estate agent or a transaction related affiliate serving the investment real estate industry, RIAOC is the association for you!

Name: Promex Indonesia
Description:
PROMEX Indonesia Is A "Bottom To Top" Based Property Agent Franchise.

The biggest challenge in the property agency franchise business today is the difficulty of encouraging property agents to do recruitment. The recruitment process is a process that always runs from top to bottom so this business cannot blow up the number of agents. The largest franchise in Indonesia currently has a maximum of 100 offices. PROMEX sees this great opportunity to change recruitment patterns from the ground up and make office probabilities more profitable.

So far, the wheel that drives a property agent office lies in the ability of the individual principal to run the business, solid management support and the strength of the brand. Although it is undeniable that more than 20 years of history of property agent offices operating in Indonesia, success has been achieved through the three strengths above. However, there is a latent power that has not been explored in depth, namely the power of agents.

"Successful and unsuccessful people do not vary greatly in their abilities. They vary in their desires to reach their potential."

Name: Enaf Guinée
Description:
Enafgn.com est une solution simple pour connecter vendeurs et acheteurs. En quelques clics, l’utilisateur peut vendre ou acheter à un prix abordables des milliers de produits de tout genre : biens immobiliers, modèle de plan architecturale, et voiture etc...

Nous assurons un maximum de service pour confrontés les acteurs ayant besoin de booster leurs activités commerciales ou pour avoir le plus de visibilités dans la promotion de leurs biens et service.

Pour mieux vendre avec la concurrence qui exulte le marché guinéens, on met en évidence une confrontation entre offreurs de service et demandeurs de service en toute simplicité  pour faciliter la touche directive des professionnels ayant du mal à faire connaitre leurs services ou leurs entreprises aux ayant besoin.

En connectant les vendeurs et les acheteurs, Enafgn.com est un levier d’accélération pour les professionnels, commerçants, artisans et PME locales à la recherche d’un nouveau canal de distribution simple et rapide.

Le challenge est de conquérir le marché du e-commerce national et international en vue de promouvoir et de facilité les activités professionnels ou commerciales des biens et services.

Enafgn.com est aussi la porte d’entrée vers le service de vente ou d’achat en ligne pour une majorité de vendeurs professionnels et les accompagnes pour réussir ce bond numérique.

Pour les consommateurs, Enafgn.com représente un accès élargi et simple à des produits de qualité et à prix abordable.

Lancé il y’a moins de six mois, Enafgn.com se place comme une référence en qualités de son site des annonces immobilières qui monte en puissance en Guinée et qui draine plusieurs milliers de visiteurs et de professionnels chaque jours.

 Aujourd’hui nous voulons êtres la référence des  annonces immobilières dans toute la Guinée. L’objectif est de couvrir toute la zone Rep. Guinée, ainsi couvrir d’autre  pays africains qui représente un marché à très fort potentiel, d’où notre positionnement y compte beaucoup.

Name: Aurion Invest
Description:
Wir haben Aurion Invest gegründet, weil wir überzeugt sind, dass Immobilienberatung transparenter, verständlicher und ehrlicher sein muss.

Zu oft wird die Branche von Fachjargon, Intransparenz und veralteten Strukturen geprägt und genau das wollen wir ändern.

Bei Aurion Invest geht es nicht darum, Objekte einfach zu verkaufen.

Wir begleiten Menschen auf dem Weg zu einem durchdachten Investment, mit klaren Prozessen, nachvollziehbaren Zahlen und einem offenen Austausch auf Augenhöhe.

Unsere Stärke liegt darin, Immobilien so aufzubereiten, dass Entscheidungen fundiert getroffen werden können.

Wir zeigen Potenziale, rechnen Szenarien durch und unterstützen auch nach dem Kauf. Vom ersten Kontaktpunkt bis zur Immobilienverwaltung.

Wir arbeiten digital, effizient und mit einem klaren Anspruch:
Investments sollen Sinn ergeben, sich rechnen und langfristig Wert schaffen.

Aurion Invest steht für einen neuen Blick auf Immobilien, der modern, transparent und nah am Menschen ist.

Wenn du wissen möchtest, wie du Immobilien als langfristige Anlage verstehen und für dich nutzen kannst, folge gerne unserer Seite.

Wir freuen uns auf den Austausch und zeigen dir, was mit der richtigen Strategie möglich ist.

Gayrimenkul Danışmanlığı: İhtiyaçlarınıza uygun gayrimenkulü bulmanızda size profesyonel destek sağlıyoruz. Portföyümüzdeki geniş seçenekler arasından sizin için en uygun olanı seçmenize yardımcı oluyoruz.

Değerleme: Gayrimenkul değerleme konusunda uzman ekibimiz, doğru değerleme metodolojileri ve piyasa analizleri ile değerli varlıklarınızın gerçek değerini belirliyor.

Mimarlık Hizmetleri: Mimari ihtiyaçlarınızı karşılamak için deneyimli mimarlarımızla birlikte çalışıyoruz. Hem estetik hem de fonksiyonel açıdan mükemmel çözümler sunarak projelerinizi hayata geçiriyoruz.

Turyap Üsküdar Meydan Temsilciliği olarak, gayrimenkul ihtiyaçlarınızı karşılamak ve projelerinizi yönetmek için buradayız. Profesyonel ve güvenilir hizmetimizle sizleri memnun etmek için sabırsızlanıyoruz.

Name: Finestmove
Description:
I won’t only consider the number of bedrooms you have or the street you reside on when determining the worth of your home. These are excellent starting points, but a genuinely accurate appraisal considers a slew of additional factors, ranging from the minor details that purchasers would like to the age of your central heating system. Years of first-hand experience with recently sold property prices, and extensive market knowledge will all help me provide you with the most accurate appraisal possible.

Before I even ring your doorbell, I’ll start valuing your home. I’ll spend some time learning about your street and the surrounding area so I can put your house in context. After a pre-call with you to understand more about your home, I will check the price and sale time of similar and recently sold properties in your area. This is a great starting point for your valuation, as it tells me buyer demand.

I will next proceed to find information about nearby schools and attractions. All of the useful items that you use on a daily basis might have an influence on the price of your home. Is there a bus stop just up the street? Great, the transportation connections may increase the value of your home! Is the grocery a 20-minute drive away? Perhaps that will have an impact as well. The general guideline is that everything that appeals to purchasers will increase the value of your house.

When I come to see you, I’ll start by asking you about your goals for the sale. While this will have no effect on the real worth of your house, it may have an impact on the selling price. While most people desire the best price possible – and this is normally what agents strive for – if your focus is a rapid sale (say, before a deadline), you might choose to list competitively.

Name: American Net Lease
Description:
American Net Lease is a premier investment real estate brokerage, specializing in buyer representation for individuals and institutions seeking passive investment opportunities through single tenant net lease (NNN) properties. Our focus is on delivering stable, tax-advantaged investments, including 1031 exchanges, tailored to high-net-worth investors, developers, and funds.

A net lease, specifically a triple net (NNN) lease, is an arrangement where the tenant is responsible for property taxes, insurance, and maintenance, providing minimal landlord responsibilities and predictable, long-term passive income. These leases are typically secured by creditworthy, national tenants, offering investors stability and consistent returns.

Based in Fort Myers, Florida, we provide a full range of brokerage and advisory services nationwide, assisting clients in building and managing portfolios of income-generating properties. Whether you’re exploring tax-deferred exchanges, diversifying your real estate holdings, or transitioning to a more passive investment strategy, American Net Lease is your trusted partner.

Contact us today to learn more about single tenant net lease investments and how we can help you achieve your financial goals.

Name: The Jorge Ramirez Group
Description:
Jorge knows that the sale or purchase of a home is both rewarding and overwhelming. With more than 10 years of experience as a real estate investor and home improvement specialist, Jorge understands the intricacies of home ownership from the ground up. 

In addition to the physical details of real estate, Jorge also understands the intangible feelings that come along with buying and selling. When he moved from Weehawken, NJ to Roselle Park, he “lost his community--” moving from an urban to suburban town was an experience that gave Jorge an immense capability to empathize with his clients who may feel trepidation at leaving their neighborhood behind for a new adventure.

Jorge loves getting to know his clients. The things that are important to his clients are what matter to Jorge the most. He is committed to servicing his clients through a historic time in their lives, guiding them toward the place where they enjoy a long-term sense of belonging.

When interviewed about his philosophy on client service and helping families get their home sold, he said, “ believe that the process of moving can be one of the biggest transitions we’ll make in our lives and it’ something I don’ take lightly.  My team and I are 100% focused on getting the most money for our client's home all the while ensuring they have a world-class experience throughout the entire process.”

Jorge continues to build his business as a Top Agent, and his team has been designed to help homeowners maximize their equity when selling their home. With his emphasis on marketing, leadership, and commitment to client service, Jorge believes his team has only just begun. His goal is to provide the very best options to consumers who are thinking of selling their home by focusing on three things;selling the home for the highest price; ensuring clients walk away with the most money in their pocket; and providing an experience that is superior to anything else available in the market place.

Description:
Hague Eastman & Associates is led by Paul Hague and Nicole Eastman who specialize in the unique niches of wineries, vineyards, commercial, and high-value homes. The team combined has over 20 years of experience in Real Estate and has represented hundreds of both residential and commercial clients.

As the premiere winery and vineyard focused Sotheby’s International Realty team in British Columbia, Hague Eastman & Associates proficiently manage winery, vineyard, business-only, cidery, and orchard transactions. Their industry-specific knowledge, market expertise, past experience, and network of industry connections enable them to effectively serve their industry client’s unique needs throughout the sale and/or purchase process. The team services all of British Columbia, focusing on the South Okanagan, Fraser Valley, Gulf Islands, and Cowichan Valley wine regions.

Most notably, Paul Hague completed the sale of Mt. Boucherie Estate Winery offered at $19 million in 2016. Recently, Paul and Nicole successfully brokered the sales of Adega on 45th Estate Winery for $6.3 million in 2025, the Forbidden Spirits property for $5.1 million in 2025, and Foxtrot Vineyards in 2024. The details of their transactions have been featured in the Globe and Mail, Western Investor, the Vancouver Sun, and local news outlets.

Hague Eastman & Associates also excel at representing extraordinary residential properties. Through their tailored, professional marketing and media connections, they are experts at showcasing high-value homes for maximum worldwide exposure. Combined with their connections through the Sotheby’s International Realty Global Network, Hague Eastman & Associates provide unparalleled service for their exceptional residential clients. They specialize in extraordinary properties and estates in the Vancouver Westside, Fraser Valley, Gulf Islands, and South Okanagan markets.

Name: salg.nu
Description:
salg.nu sikrer boligejere/sælgere nem & hurtig kontakt til de aboslut bedste, mest kompetente & rareste mæglere i lokalområdet. På den måde får I den bedste, mest optimale handel & oplevelse samt gør en positiv forskel for jer & jeres boligsalg 

Vi HAR taget alle "tæskene og skuffelserne", så boligejere og boligsælgere ikke bliver udsat for dem.

Name: Investments Real Estate Advisor
Description:
Encontrar la propiedad perfecta no debería ser complicado… pero sí emocionante.
En nuestro equipo de corredores de bienes raíces en Panamá, nos encargamos de que cada paso sea claro, rápido y lleno de posibilidades.

Conectamos personas, empresas e inversionistas con espacios que hacen sentido: hogares para empezar una nueva etapa, oficinas que impulsan negocios, propiedades que generan ingresos y lugares que inspiran.

¿Quieres tu primera vivienda? ¿Una propiedad para vacaciones? ¿O tal vez invertir en un proyecto con alto retorno? Sea cual sea tu objetivo, te guiamos de principio a fin: desde entender lo que buscas, hasta cerrar el trato con la seguridad de haber tomado la mejor decisión.

Trabajamos con clientes locales que quieren vivir mejor y con personas de todo el mundo que ven en Panamá una oportunidad para crecer, invertir o migrar.

No creemos en vender por vender. Creemos en escucharte, entenderte y presentarte solo las opciones que realmente encajan contigo. Por eso, más que corredores, somos asesores y aliados que buscan que cada transacción sea una experiencia positiva.

 En resumen: si buscas comprar, vender o alquilar en Panamá, lo hacemos fácil, seguro y a tu medida.

Name: Woonland Makelaars
Description:

Bij ons draait het om meer dan alleen huizen kopen en verkopen – we creëren een thuis!
Woonland biedt een all-in woonconcept voor de consument. Dit betekent dat onze klanten bij ons terecht kunnen voor alle diensten die te maken hebben met wonen. Van makelaarsdiensten, hypotheekadvies en verzekeringen tot bouwkundige keuringen en verduurzamingsadvies. Name: Domestics | Monapart
Description:

Nuestro nombre refleja nuestra forma de trabajar: vender o alquilar una propiedad es más que una simple transacción y por eso tratamos cada vivienda como si fuera la nuestra. Con cercanía y profesionalidad desde la primera conversación hasta el cierre de la operación, estamos a tu lado para garantizar que todo el proceso sea claro, eficiente y siempre con el mejor resultado.

Contamos con tres departamentos especializados: ventas, alquileres y administración de propiedades, porque cada servicio tiene su propio ritmo y requiere un enfoque y conocimientos específicos.

Somos Domestics porque conocemos el sector inmobiliario por dentro, por fuera, del derecho y del revés, acompañando a las personas en una de las decisiones más importantes de su vida: cambiar de hogar. Y lo hacemos desde el compromiso con la transformación del sector para hacerlo más humano, profesional, transparente y empático.

Name: Chad Massaker LLC (brokered by EXP Commercial)
Description:
Chad Massaker is a long-time serial entrepreneur who has turned his considerable depth of experience and skill to the business of real estate, primarily driven by a desire to use what he knows to help clients adroitly navigate real estate transactions. Having worked primarily in technology, digital marketing, and sales, and boasting a nearly peerless personal online network, Chad is adept at solving problems, making connections, and finding the right information. Shifting to real estate has enabled him to apply his varied interests and proficiencies in a capacity that is much more people-focused.

 

His singular perspective helps Chad create strategic outcomes for his clients. The tangible effects—constructing a successful deal—are less vital for him than the more intangible, knowing people will benefit from his collaboration. As a successful entrepreneur and investor, Chad knows what it’s like to be a business owner looking for space and negotiating lease issues. He is able to call upon his exceptional technical abilities to find off-market inventory, and fully optimize digital reach to market a property. You’ll find working with Chad to be exciting, energizing, and ultimately more productive than you could imagine with any other agent.

 

Relocating from Atlanta to Palm Beach, Chad is highly optimistic about the region and the opportunities presented by challenge. With commerce in flux, evolving demographics, and demand in development, South Florida is dynamic and a compelling place to be involved with real estate.

 

Personally as well as professionally, Chad’s achievements are many. Unsere Vision ist es, eine nachhaltige Zukunft zu gestalten, indem wir hochwertige und langlebige Produkte anbieten, die den Menschen in den Mittelpunkt stellen. Mit unserem Wissen, unserer Inspiration und Motivation bieten wir bestmögliche Beratung mit hoher Qualität und schaffen somit eine Welt, in der Nachhaltigkeit und Menschlichkeit im Einklang stehen. Unser Fokus liegt dabei auf der Verwendung von umweltfreundlichen Materialien und einer energieeffizienten Bauweise, um unseren ökologischen Fußabdruck so gering wie möglich zu halten. Wir möchten nicht nur heute eine positive Wirkung erzielen, sondern auch langfristig einen Beitrag zur Erhaltung unserer Umwelt leisten.

Neben dem Bau von Wohnungen setzen wir uns auch für die Schaffung nachhaltiger Arbeitsplätze ein. Unsere Mitarbeiter sind das Herzstück unseres Unternehmens und wir legen großen Wert darauf, dass sie fair behandelt werden und sich in ihrem Job wohlfühlen.

Wir glauben daran, dass jeder Einzelne dazu beitragen kann, unsere Welt ein Stückchen besser zu machen – sei es durch bewussten Konsum oder den Einsatz für eine gute Sache. Deshalb engagieren wir uns aktiv in verschiedenen Projekten und unterstützen gemeinnützige Organisationen.

Unsere Vision ist groß – aber mit unserem Engagement und Ihrer Unterstützung können wir gemeinsam viel erreichen!

Här är några exempel:

·Förmedling av bostäder värda över 8 miljarder kronor årligen
·10 kontor i Stockholmsområdet (främst franchise)
·Cirka 70 mäklare
·In-house kameraman
·In-house mötesbokningsteam
·In-house stylister
·Dominerande marknadsandelar i Hammarby Sjöstad, Södermalm och delar av Nacka & Årsta

Det som gjort det möjligt för oss att snabbt bredda vår affärsmodell är framför allt vårt upplägg för mäklare: många av våra mäklare driver sina egna bolag under vårt varumärke, får största delen av arvodet och kan själv styra sin försäljning. Hos oss är du inte heller begränsad till specifika områden, vilket ger möjlighet att bygga ett nätverk över hela Stockholm om du vill.

Kombinationen av detta med vår marknadsföring, där mäklare kan välja mellan videofilm och stillbilder, ger varje mäklare alla verktyg för att nå ut till maximalt antal potentiella kunder.
Som mäklare hos oss får du alltså möjlighet att:

·Bygga upp ditt eget bolag med god lönsamhet
·Ta större delen av arvodet
·Skräddarsy försäljningen efter egna idéer gällande marknadsföring, styling med mera
·Arbeta med frihet över hela Stockholm

Kontakta oss gärna på: kontakt@bosthlm.se vid frågor eller allmänt intresse!

Med vänlig hälsning,
Bo Sthlm Teamet

Name: MK Dream Houses
Description:
Welkom bij MK Dream Houses, het resultaat van de passie en expertise van Kylie en Martijn. Wij zijn gespecialiseerd in het aanbieden van prachtige Spaanse woningen aan de Costa Blanca en Costa Calida, in samenwerking met het gerenommeerde Masa International. Onze unieke benadering zorgt ervoor dat het vinden van uw droomhuis een naadloze en plezierige ervaring wordt.

Of u nu op zoek bent naar een zonnige vakantiewoning, een investeringsmogelijkheid of een permanente verhuizing naar Spanje overweegt, wij bieden een breed scala aan woningen die aan al uw wensen voldoen. Met een diepgaand begrip van de lokale markt en een toegewijde aanpak zorgen wij ervoor dat u de perfecte plek vindt die aan uw verwachtingen voldoet.

Naast het bemiddelen in onroerend goed, bieden wij ook uitgebreide diensten op het gebied van renovatie en verbouwingen. Of het nu gaat om het transformeren van uw bestaande woning of het aanpassen van uw recent aangekochte Spaanse droomhuis, wij staan klaar om uw visie werkelijkheid te maken. Ons team van ervaren professionals levert hoogwaardig vakmanschap en zorgt voor een vlekkeloze uitvoering van uw project.

Voor diegenen die hun interieur willen verfraaien en optimaliseren, bieden wij ook een uitgebreide interieurontwerp service aan. Of het nu gaat om een volledige make-over van uw huis in Nederland of België, of het toevoegen van de laatste trends aan uw Spaanse woning, wij streven ernaar om esthetiek en functionaliteit te combineren om uw leefruimte te verbeteren.

Bij MK Dream Houses gaan we verder dan alleen het verkopen van woningen. Wij begrijpen dat uw huis meer is dan alleen stenen en muren; het is een weerspiegeling van uw levensstijl en persoonlijkheid. Daarom streven we ernaar om niet alleen huizen te verkopen, maar dromen waar te maken en levens te verbeteren. Ontdek vandaag nog hoe wij uw vastgoedervaring kunnen verrijken en uw dromen realiteit kunnen maken.

Name: Raadhuys Makelaars
Description:
Wij zijn Raadhuys Makelaars. Persoonlijk. Betrokken. Vertrouwd.

Het kopen of verkopen van een huis is een vak dat wij als geen ander verstaan. Wij kennen de huizenmarkt in onze regio die zich uitstrekt over de driehoek ’s-Hertogenbosch, Oss en Bernheze. Wij weten waar uw kansen liggen. Wij weten wat er te koop is en wat de waarde van een huis beïnvloedt. Deze kennis zetten wij graag voor u in bij de verkoop of taxatie van uw huis. En natuurlijk ook bij de aankoop van uw nieuwe droomhuis.

Wat ons écht onderscheidend maakt, is ons bevlogen team. We vullen elkaar aan, hebben samen ruim 65 jaar ervaring in het vak en nemen vanaf de eerste kennismaking de tijd om u en uw woonwensen écht te leren kennen. Wij begrijpen dat het kopen of verkopen van een huis één van de belangrijkste beslissingen in uw leven is. Wij begeleiden u daarom soepel door het hele proces en zetten net dat stapje extra. Dit betekent dat u vanaf ons eerste contact tot na de overdracht op ons kunt rekenen.

Name: Den Otter Van Vliet
Description:
BEDRIJFSOVERDRACHT:
-	Voorbereiden overdracht binnen de familie of aan derden;
-	Begeleiding bij verkoop en overdracht;
-	Een bedrijf aankopen.

Wij geloven in een totaalaanpak, daarom snappen wij dat een bedrijf meer is dan een pand.
Wij weten wat er allemaal komt kijken bij een bedrijfsoverdracht, en mochten we worden verrast, deinzen wij niet terug. Als u het ons toelaat, willen wij graag helpen met uitdagingen die we onderweg tegenkomen. U kunt op ons rekenen. Of het nu gaat om de waardebepaling van uw recreatiebedrijf, de coaching van medewerkers of ondernemers zelf, of de bemiddeling bij een geschil. Wij willen samen werken tot een oplossing en staan altijd voor u klaar.

WAARDERING:
- Taxatie voor financiering
- Waardebepaling voor verkoop
- Vaststellen van de erfpachtcanon
- Deskundigenbericht t.b.v. de rechtbank

Wij houden van ons werk, daarom hebben wij ons gespecialiseerd in wat we doen.
Zo ook de waardebepaling van recreatiebedrijven, een aparte tak van sport wat ons betreft.
Wij weten wat er komt kijken bij de taxatie van een recreatiebedrijf.
We maken de complexe berekeningen voor u inzichtelijk en hebben een unieke kijk op de situatie.
Dit stelt ons in staat om een antwoord te geven op al uw taxatie vraagstukken.

COACHING:
- Loopbaankeuzes;
- Persoonlijke ontwikkeling;
- (Dreigende) burn-out;
- Begeleiding binnen het familiebedrijf.

Wij houden van mensen, daarom staat u bij ons altijd voorop.
Je wilt vooruit. Maar soms is het niet duidelijk welke stappen daarvoor nodig zijn, of kan een situatie onmogelijk aanvoelen. Wij stellen de juiste vragen om je verder te helpen. Samen ontrafelen we de situatie, bekijken we jouw vragen en proberen deze te beantwoorden. Zo identificeren we de hulpvraag en helpen wij met het formuleren van een antwoord. Jij doet het, wij zijn er om je hierbij te helpen. 

(CONFLICT) BEMIDDELING
- Dreigende conflicten op de werkvloer
- Bemiddeling ter voorkoming van een rechtzaak 
- Mediation

Name: Immobiliare Città Studi Milano
Description:
Immobiliare Città Studi Milano è un’agenzia che svolge attività di consulenza, intermediazione e assistenza, con l’obiettivo di soddisfare le molteplici esigenze connesse al settore immobiliare, sia nel comparto residenziale che in quello commerciale.

L’agenzia si è specializzata nella commercializzazione degli immobili ubicati nelle città di Milano e in particolare nel quartiere Città Studi, si pone quale punto di riferimento della zona sia per le compravendite che per le locazioni.

La nostra struttura soddisfa l’esigenza della Clientela, di avere a disposizione un “operatore specifico” che, forte dell’esperienza maturata in oltre 20 anni di attività, ha scelto di dedicarsi prevalentemente a quest'area della città.

Si avvale inoltre della collaborazione di strutture selezionate che possono gestire particolari tipologie di immobili su gran parte del territorio nazionale.

Offre un servizio finalizzato ad affiancare la Clientela in ogni passaggio, ciò grazie ad un preciso metodo operativo che parte dall’analisi accurata delle sue esigenze, individuando poi la soluzione ideale da adattare ad ogni singola richiesta.

Con lo sguardo attento alle più moderne dinamiche pubblicitarie, promuove al meglio gli incarichi conferiti utilizzando i maggiori portali web dedicati al settore e le tecnologie più innovative ed efficaci.

Sviluppa e utilizza le sinergie nascenti dalla collaborazione con primari studi professionali, potendo così offrire all’occorrenza ogni tipo di assistenza: tecnica, legale, notarile e finanziaria.

Name: Viterra Grupo Inmobiliario
Description:
Viterra grupo inmobiliario somos una familia con experiencia de 3 generaciones en el ramo inmobiliario, en particular esta empresa fue fundada en 2003, primero bajo el nombre de Bustamante Grupo Inmobiliario y en el 2010 adoptamos nuestro nuevo y definitivo nombre VITERRA, que viene de las palabras VIDA Y TIERRA.
Somos una compañía creadora de estrategias, diseños e ideas con amplia capacitación en negociación, para lograr productos comercialmente exitosos en el mercado inmobiliario. Tenemos especialidad en el mercado habitacional residencial, industrial, logístico, comercial y corporativo.  Nuestra oficina matriz se encuentra en Guadalajara, contamos con oficina en Puerto Vallarta, Querétaro, Cancún y León.  hoy somos en nuestra empresa 154 personas creando valor a nuestros clientes.
 Entendemos que al representar la comercialización de múltiples desarrollos  los pone a pensar en que se pueda descuidar por nuestra parte un nuevo desarrollo.  Quiero transmitirles con toda seguridad que nuestra compañía respeta la política de especialización que nos ha llevado a crecer en el mercado.	Con independencia de tener uno o 15 desarrollos, todas las fuerzas de ventas deben estar especializadas y concentradas en el desarrollo que les corresponde, teniendo prohibido el distraerse ofreciendo producto de otro lado.  Cada fuerza de ventas esta capacitada a fondo en su producto, conociendo y manejando las fortalezas, con un conocimiento total de su producto en el mercado y en su competencia.	Para cada desarrollo se diseña un plan estratégico de trabajo.

Name: Spider Lily Properties
Description:
Every story has a starting point, and ours began with survival — and a promise. After living through 9/11, Roberto Benitez wanted to build something that made life better for others. That vision became Spider Lily Properties, Abu Dhabi’s first People of Determination–owned real estate brokerage. We don’t just sell properties — we match people to places that restore dignity and independence.
We’re fully licensed under ADREC/DARI and registered with TAMM, working with organizations like ZHO and ADDED to turn inclusion into something real, not just aspirational. You can see it in the homes we recommend, the clients we serve, and the values we live by.
From accessible rentals to inclusive off-plan investments and senior-friendly communities, we help people find homes that fit their lives — not the other way around. Our office in Al Bahia, just minutes from Yas Island and the future Disney development, keeps us close to Abu Dhabi’s next wave of growth and opportunity.
And because we’re a family business — Roberto, Samantha, and Zoe Benitez — we work with heart first and titles second. Our goal is simple: make accessibility the norm in UAE real estate so every client, from investor to individual, feels seen, heard, and at home.
 Licensed Brokers | PoD-Owned | UAE Vision 2030 Aligned
 Where Dignity Meets Opportunity in Every Home.

Name: Renavis
Description:
Renavis was established in August 2024 and provides advisory and brokerage services for commercial real estate users in Lodz and the surrounding areas. The company’s name is an acronym for Real Estate Navis (“Navis” – Latin for “Łódź”).
We offer comprehensive support in the lease, sale and purchase of commercial properties: office, warehouse and manufacturing. We help companies looking for the best location for their business and owners who want to rent or sell their property efficiently.
The founder and CEO of Renavis is Marcin Wlodarczyk, a licensed real estate agent with over 20 years of experience in the commercial market, holder of the CCIM title. From 2015 to 2024, he headed the Łódź branch of Colliers Poland. He served more than 60 companies in more than 100 transactions, where he personally led or supervised lease projects totaling more than 120,000 sq.m. of space. He has worked with the largest and most important companies in the modern business services sector in Łódź (BPO, SSC, ITO, RD).
Between 2006 and 2013, he headed the Department of Investor Services at the Łódź Special Economic Zone SA and, as responsible for the purchase and sale of real estate, carried out dozens of transactions for the purchase and sale of industrial real estate – investment land with a total area of more than 40 hectares, located throughout the province of Łódź.
He serves clients in Polish, English and French. In 2005, he completed postgraduate studies in “Real estate brokerage” at the Faculty of Law of Warsaw University and defended his thesis on the ethical principles of the real estate agent profession. In 2005, he obtained broker’s license No. 9281.

Just Real Estate si contraddistingue per la capacità di studiare, comprendere, individuare e proporre, un’ampia scelta immobiliare adatta e confacente ai diversi stili di vita e personalità.
Per questo per noi è importante puntare alla qualità dei risultati con competenza, dinamicità ed esclusività.

Name: Mediatori Associati Parma
Description:
Mediatori Associati Parma s.r.l. è una società che vanta un’esperienza nel settore immobiliare tramandata da due generazioni, dal tempo in cui una stretta di mano e la parola erano sufficienti a stipulare qualsiasi contratto.

Antichi valori, legati alla fiducia personale, tuttora alla base del nostro “modus operandi”, supportati dalla professionalità e dalla serietà di tutto il nostro personale.

La nostra organizzazione è composta da agenti immobiliari, impiegate e collaboratori giovani e dinamici che già da tempo costituiscono un team affiatato e omogeneo condividendo non solo il lavoro ma anche altre esperienze.

Un gruppo di professionisti del settore che è in grado di garantire la risoluzione di tutte le problematiche legate al “pianeta casa” e gode inoltre della stima e della fiducia di tutti i più noti istituti di credito, studi notarili e di commercialisti, ingegneri, architetti e geometri, e delle più solide imprese di costruzioni della provincia di Parma.

Queste sono le nostre migliori credenziali!

La serietà e la disponibilità che ci caratterizzano fanno della Mediatori Associati Parma il luogo più sicuro per vendere, acquistare, affittare, far valutare qualsiasi tipo di immobile.

Name: Miami Real Estate Group
Description:
Andres Asion (Broker of Miami Real Estate Group) has been at the forefront of the South Florida Real Estate market for over 20 years. Specializing in all aspects of high-rise development sales, embryonic stage to completion, his expertise runs the gamut and ranges from consulting on the programming of units, partnerships, and pricing of developments to building sales teams, training, and management.

Today MREG is also involved in helping companies and families relocate to Miami.  Educating current and new residents of the quickly changing Miami Real Estate market. 

From 2009 to 2016, Asion served as Vice President of Development Sales for Fortune International Group where he was involved in the sale of more than 39 developments, surpassing the $10 Billion mark. 

Asion began his real estate career at Cervera Real Estate, and later became the VP of Sales, leading many of the company’s developments during the 12 years he was with the firm.

While real estate is his passion, giving back to the community through the “Andres Asion Foundation” is where he finds his greatest reward. Aimed at bettering the lives of children in need through contributions in which 100% of all funds benefit the organizations being supported, Asion’s commitment to servant leadership is one of his highest priorities.

Name: Agnt AI
Description: The integration of large language models (LLMs) and our unique aggregation of data from 318 MLS feeds is revolutionizing the national real estate landscape. By harnessing comprehensive consumer search behaviors derived from the prestigious IDX websites we manage for top agents, we offer unmatched insights into real estate trends and client preferences. This enriched dataset not only provides our AI systems with a deep understanding of market dynamics but also allows individual agents to elevate their service by integrating their personal sales experiences, bios, and histories of past transactions directly into their decision-making processes.The synthesis of this extensive data through sophisticated LLMs enables a personalized, precise, and predictive approach to real estate. Agents are empowered with real-time analytics that interpret complex market signals and client data, offering a tailored strategy for each unique market scenario. Such a robust combination of technology and personalized agent profiles facilitates a nuanced understanding of both macro and micro market trends, optimizing listing strategies, and enhancing client interactions. This holistic approach not only makes our operations more efficient but also significantly enriches the value delivered to each client, ensuring their real estate decisions are informed by both the highest level of data intelligence and the nuanced expertise of seasoned professionals.

Name: Equinox Estates Ltd
Description:
Strategic Real Estate Advisory | Off-Market Access | Global Investment Intelligence

Equinox Estates Ltd. is a full-service real estate brokerage and advisory firm operating across the UK and UAE. We specialise in sourcing, structuring, and scaling real estate opportunities for a global client base — from luxury off-plan residences to institutional-grade off-market assets.

Our expertise spans both ends of the spectrum. On one side, we work directly with leading developers to offer premium access to new build and off-plan opportunities in key markets. On the other, our dedicated off-market division sources discreet, high-value assets unavailable to the public — including land (with or without planning), unbroken residential blocks, office buildings, student accommodations, HMOs, trophy assets, and more.

We proudly serve an elite and diverse clientele, including:

Family Offices

Investment Funds

Royal Families & Government Entities

Private Developers & HNWIs

Tech Entrepreneurs, Celebrities & Athletes

In addition to acquisitions and disposals, Equinox Estates offers bespoke capital solutions through our network of private lenders, challenger banks, specialist funds, and family offices. From bridge loans and development finance to refinancing complex portfolios — we provide fast, strategic access to real estate capital.

Our mission is to deliver intelligent, high-conviction property solutions that help our clients unlock long-term value, accelerate growth, and capitalise on market timing.

Whether you’re acquiring a single asset, building a portfolio, or seeking discreet off-market intelligence — Equinox Estates Ltd. is your trusted partner in high-performance real estate.

En nombre Diamar significa "diamante" en español. Es un nombre de origen latino que se deriva del vocablo griego " adamas, que significa "invencible" o "inescapable". El nombre puede usarse para referirse a los valores intrínsecos como fuerza, la perseverancia y la resiliencia.

Name: Wijngaarde Makelaars
Description:
The housing market is constantly changing, but real estate brokerage is still the same as it was 50 years ago. An office on the corner of the street, signs of homes in the window and static photos of a home. While those homes are often already sold the moment they are shoved in the frames in front of the window. That's why we do things differently: The quality of the good old days, but with realtors of today. Our clients call this "refreshing."

We put a lot of time into the presentation of your home. So that your home stands out head and shoulders above the homes it competes with. We achieve this by using the best home staging and the best home marketing. And that's a tailor-made strategy every time to get the maximum number of viewings. But the result is the same each time: satisfied sellers ánd buyers.

Because don't forget: also striving for a satisfied buyer, prevents a lot of headaches later on for you as a seller!

And that our approach works is reflected in our reviews. And that's why we do it. Because our customer of yesterday, provides our customer of tomorrow.

Shall we schedule a refreshing conversation?

Description:
En Rentabilízate somos un equipo de profesionales calificados para asesorarte en la adquisición de tu nueva vivienda o inversión, en todo el proceso de compra, tenemos los mejores proyectos inmobiliarios, donde podrás encontrar convenios y descuentos.

En Rentabilízate te ayudamos en todo el proceso de compra de tu departamento de inversión o vivienda, te lo explicamos en 5 pasos: 

1)Asesoría Financiera: Analizamos toda tu Información financiera, para poder entregarte las mejores propuestas de inversión que se adapten a tus ingresos y capacidad de ahorro. 

2)Presentación y elección de proyectos: Te ayudamos con la toma de decisión de tu proyecto, para que rentabilicen tu capital lo más posible. "El negocio no se hace cuando se vende, sino cuando se compra". Si compas bien, aunque vendas mal ganarás.

3)Gestión de financiamiento: Gestionamos tu crédito hipotecario con las distintas entidades financieras, consiguiendo las mejores condiciones para ti y tu futura inversión.

4)Firma de contrato de compra y venta: Te orientamos y acompañamos con la firma de tus promesas de compraventa con la inmobiliaria y luego en el proceso de escritura. 

5)Administración y corretaje: Contamos con la administración y corretaje de tus propiedades. 

Contáctanos para recibir mas información.

Name: CONNEXION
Description:
CONNEXION is a system that efficiently matches time-strapped lawyers and busy professionals with real estate representation anywhere in Canada.

Run by Chris Butryn, Real Estate Broker (15+ years’ experience) and former lawyer (license surrendered), CONNEXION is built on one principle from his legal days: time is money. Chris knows that every extra hour spent searching for the right real estate agent is time taken from clients and your bottom line. That’s why he created CONNEXION—to cut that search time down to almost zero. 

CONNEXION won’t send you a bill. The cost is covered by the real estate agents you hire, through referral fees. Payment of referral fees between licensed agents is common and fully legitimate.

At a glance
 Saves time for lawyers, executors, and consumers
 Offers curated referrals across Canada
 Provides Agent Briefs with honest, relevant detail
 Operates with neutrality — no agent pays for promotion

CONNEXION serves
• Estates lawyers and legal professionals who don’t have time to screen agents
• Executors and families handling real estate as part of an estate
• Buyers and sellers seeking efficient, fact-based insight before deciding who to interview

For professional or personal real estate needs, just reach out to Chris with a call, email or DM.

416-318-8746
Chris@TheConnexion.ca

Chris Butryn is a Real Estate Broker with Royal LePage Connect Realty Brokerage independently owned and operated. Nothing herein is intended to solicit anyone already under contract with a brokerage. All views are Chris' own and all rights are reserved.
